The comic "Where Citations Come From" is a humorous way of explaining how people find sources to cite in their research or writing. In the comic, a person is shown looking through a telescope, trying to find sources in the vastness of space. But instead of finding sources out in space, the person finds a group of people on a distant planet who are frantically running around and gathering information from all kinds of sources. The joke of the comic is that people don't actually find sources out in space or in some far-off place, but rather, they have to do some research and digging to find reliable sources of information. This can involve looking through books, articles, websites, and other sources to find the information they need. The comic is meant to be funny, but it also highlights the importance of finding good sources and citing them properly when doing research or writing. It's important to make sure that the sources you use are accurate and trustworthy, and to give credit to the people who did the original research or writing.

There are a few reasons why the study of unidentified flying objects, or UFOs, is not a mainstream subject of scientific research. 
First, most sightings of UFOs turn out to have a mundane explanation, such as a plane, a balloon, or a hoax. While it is possible that some UFO sightings may be of things that are not yet understood, there is not enough evidence to conclude that they are aliens or otherworldly spacecraft. 
Second, studying UFOs is not a priority for most scientists and researchers because there are many other areas of science that are more likely to yield new knowledge and understanding. For example, researchers may be more interested in studying diseases, climate change, or the origins of the universe, as these topics have more direct and tangible impacts on people's lives. 
Finally, the study of UFOs can be considered a fringe or pseudoscientific topic by some, which means that it is not taken as seriously as other areas of scientific research. This can make it difficult for researchers who are interested in studying UFOs to get funding or support for their work. 
Overall, while the study of UFOs may be interesting to some people, it is not a mainstream area of scientific research because there is not enough evidence to support the idea that they are real and because there are many other areas of science that are considered to be more important and worthwhile to study.

So basically there are different types of numbers you see in common early math ... Integers : Your obvious counting numbers ( i.e. -2 -1 0 1 2 ... ) . Rational : any number that can be expressed as the ration of 2 integers ( e.g. 1.5 is 3/2 and 2 is 2/1 ) . As you can see all integers are rational numbers but not all rational numbers are integers . Irrational : Real numbers that can not be expressed as a ratio of integers . Common examples are Pi ( a circles circumferance divided by its diameter ) and e ( the limit as n goes to infinity of ( 1 + 1 / n)^n).I understand you may not be far enough in math though to necessary get this concept . Furthermore you can extend to different planes ( as opposed to your standard x - y plane ) and come up with other concepts like imaginary numbers .

Dreams are a natural part of the sleep process, and they occur during the rapid eye movement (REM) stage of sleep. During this stage, your brain is highly active and your body is paralyzed, which helps you to stay asleep and not act out your dreams.The content of dreams can vary widely and may include a range of emotions, thoughts, and experiences. It's not uncommon for dreams to feel intense or vivid, and for them to involve conflicts or challenges that seem to be reaching a climax.It's possible that dreams may seem to reach their climax right before you wake up because your brain is more active at this time, which can make the dream feel more vivid and intense. It's also possible that the transition from the REM stage of sleep to the waking state may contribute to the feeling that the dream is reaching its climax.Overall, the exact reason why dreams may seem to reach their climax right before you wake up is not fully understood, and more research is needed to understand the full range of factors that may contribute to this experience.

When you stretch, your blood flow increases to the muscles that you are stretching. This increased blood flow can temporarily change the blood flow to your inner ear, which is responsible for your sense of hearing. This change in blood flow can cause a temporary muffling or reduction in the clarity of the sounds that you hear. This is a normal and temporary effect and is not a cause for concern. It should resolve on its own within a short period of time after you finish stretching. If you are experiencing persistent problems with your hearing, it is always a good idea to speak with a healthcare professional for a proper evaluation.

People without restless legs syndrome may shake their legs while seated for a variety of reasons. One reason could be that they are feeling anxious or nervous and shaking their legs helps them release tension or nervous energy. Another reason could be that they are simply trying to stay awake or alert. Shaking their legs can help increase blood flow and keep them from feeling sluggish or drowsy. Finally, some people may just do it out of habit, without consciously thinking about it. It's a common behavior that can be hard to control, just like how some people might tap their fingers or fidget with their hands when they're sitting still.

Water jet propulsion is a means of propelling a boat or ship through the water using a jet of high-pressure water ejected from the back of the vessel. The water jet system consists of a pumping unit, which generates the high-pressure water, and a nozzle, which directs the water jet.

The pumping unit is typically driven by an engine or motor and uses an impeller to pressurize the water and force it through a narrow outlet, known as a jet nozzle. The water jet nozzle is mounted at the stern of the vessel and can be adjusted to direct the jet of water at different angles.

Water jet propulsion is known for its high efficiency and ability to operate in shallow waters, as it does not require a large propeller or rudder. It is also relatively quiet and generates minimal underwater noise, which makes it well-suited for use in sensitive marine environments. Water jet propulsion is often used on high-speed boats, ferries, and other vessels that require a high level of maneuverability.

I'm sorry to hear about your ongoing health issues. Upper gastrointestinal (GI) bleeding can be a serious and potentially life-threatening condition, and it is important to seek medical attention as soon as possible if you are experiencing bleeding.

Treatment for upper GI bleeding will depend on the cause of the bleeding and the severity of the bleeding. Some possible treatments include:

Medications: Your doctor may prescribe medications to help control bleeding and reduce the risk of further bleeding. These may include acid-reducing medications, blood-clotting medications, or medications to help repair damaged blood vessels.

Endoscopy: Your doctor may perform an endoscopy, which is a procedure that involves inserting a small, flexible tube with a camera on the end through your mouth and into your stomach. This can allow your doctor to see any areas of bleeding and take action to stop the bleeding.

Surgery: In some cases, surgery may be necessary to stop the bleeding and repair any damage. This may involve repairing damaged blood vessels or removing a section of the GI tract.

It's important to work closely with your healthcare team to determine the best treatment approach for your specific situation. It's also important to discuss any concerns or questions you have with your doctor.

Death by firing squad is a method of execution in which a person is shot to death by a group of shooters using firearms. While it may seem quick and painless, death by firing squad can actually be a very violent and traumatic way to die.

One reason it is considered a bad way to die is that it can be very difficult for the shooters to aim accurately and kill the person with a single shot. This can result in the person being shot multiple times and suffering from severe wounds and a prolonged death.

Another reason is that death by firing squad can be very frightening and stressful for the person being executed. Being shot at by a group of people can be a terrifying experience, and the person may experience extreme fear and panic in the moments leading up to their death.

Finally, death by firing squad is considered a particularly inhumane form of execution because it is a very public and violent way to die. The person being executed is often put on display in front of a large crowd, which can be distressing for them and their loved ones.

Overall, while death by firing squad may seem like a quick and painless way to die, it can actually be a very violent and traumatic experience.

Marvel Studios is a film production company that is a division of Marvel Entertainment, which is owned by The Walt Disney Company. Marvel Studios is responsible for producing movies based on Marvel Comics characters and franchises, including the Avengers and Spider-Man. There are a few key factors that have contributed to Marvel's success in making superhero movies: 1. Marvel has a vast library of popular and beloved characters and storylines to draw from, which provides a rich source of material for movie adaptations. 2. Marvel has a team of talented filmmakers, including writers, directors, and producers, who are skilled at bringing these characters and stories to life on the big screen. 3. Marvel has a dedicated and passionate fan base that is excited to see their favorite characters and storylines brought to life in movies. 4. Marvel has a strong marketing and distribution network, which helps to promote its movies and get them seen by a wide audience. Overall, Marvel's success in making superhero movies can be attributed to a combination of factors, including the quality of its storytelling, the talent of its filmmakers, and the support of its fans.

After the humans used nukes to blacken the skies to stop the robots from using the sun as an energy source , the robots found a way to use humans instead . To subdue them , the matrix was thought up to imprison the minds . The first attempt emulated a perfect world , which was incompatible with human nature . So most of them died . To fix this problem in future versions , a release valve was thought up . This would allow the subjects to accept or reject the matrix , even if only subconsciously . 99 % of subjects accepted it . The remaining 1 % were ejected from the robot plants . Some survived and formed a city , Zion . The programming code used to implement the choice - system also introduced an instability in the matrix , which caused it to destabilize every 100 years or so , and require it to be restarted . During each restart , the robots also wiped out Zion to prevent it from getting too big and becoming a problem . During the first successful matrix cycle , a significant anomaly was introduced into the matrix due to this instability . This manifested in a human being born within the matrix with access to programming code that did not belong within the matrix , but with the Source itself ( the central consciousness of the robot civilization that resided outside of the matrix , in the robot city ) . This allowed that human to manipulate the matrix in unintended ways . The Architect of the matrix tried to remove the anomaly unsuccessfully . Being the ' logical ' entity of the Source , and unable to find a logical solution to the anomaly , he turned to the ' intuitive ' entity of the Source , the Oracle . The Oracle devised a potential solution : instead of trying to eliminate the anomaly , guide it back to the Source so that the code it contained could be reintegrated . This was the reason for the need to restart the matrix every 100 years : reintegrate the anomaly into the Source , purge the system , and select a small number of individuals from the system to repopulate the new matrix . Everything was going great for about 6 cycles , or presumably 600 years . Until something unexpected happened in the sixth cycle . During the confrontation between Neo and Agent Smith , at the end of the first movie , Neo attempted to destroy Smith by injecting himself into Smith , taking over the program , and overloading it , seemingly causing its destruction . Normally , after being destroyed , a program would leave the matrix and return to the Source , where its resources would be reintegrated . However , Neo also injected part of the Source code into Smith during this process , which Smith was then able to use to break free of his pre - written rules and prevent himself from returning to the Source . Smith was able to seemingly gain free will as well as many of the powers of the anomaly , like infecting other programs , and even users connected to the matrix . Smith manifests as the anti - anomaly , the opposite of the One , with the purpose of infecting and destroying the matrix and Source , instead of reintegrating and perpetuating the system . Eventually , Smith goes viral and infects the Oracle , gaining her powers as well . Meanwhile , Neo makes his way to the meeting with the Architect , but stops short of reintegrating with the Source . He decides instead to save Trinity , which seemingly dooms the matrix and the inhabitants of Zion , as the robots are preparing to complete the next purge and are willing to do so even without a new crop of humans ( selected by the anomaly ) to repopulate the plant . However , there is a problem . The Source knows that it can not stop Smith . Neo makes a deal with it just before the destruction of Zion : let him go in and try to stop Smith . If he succeeds , spare Zion . Otherwise , it wo n't matter anyway as both will be wiped out . The Source sends him in . Smith is far too powerful by now to be stopped . Neo puts up a good fight but in the end gets creamed . He wo n't give up though . Frustrated , Smith tries to absorb Neo . Neo allows this , perhaps realizing , perhaps not , that he is directly connected to the Source at that moment , having been jacked into the matrix literally at the Source . As Smith injects himself into Neo , the last bits of the remaining Source code that had not been reintegrated , the code inside Smith himself , is rejoined with the Source , and the reintegration process is completed . This allows the Source to wipe the matrix clean to a reset state , cleaning out Smith in the process . Smith is destroyed , and Neo dies in the process of having the Source pump all the energy of the reset signal directly through his body . Zion is spared , as agreed upon . The machines successfully reload the matrix . Both civilizations then coexist in peace for some undetermined period . Edits for spelling / grammar Edit : thanks for the gold stranger ! This is my first gilded comment . Also , thanks /u / makemisteaks for elaborating below on the lead up to the war , the Oracle , and Zion . Could not have put it better myself !

The two prongs are n't functionally the same . One is " hot , " and does all the work of pushing electrons back and forth in the wire to supply electric power to your devices . The other prong is " neutral " and is there to complete the path for the electrons to flow . It 's not providing the power , but it is necessary to pick up the slack . Many devices do n't care which wire is providing power . But others require power to be supplied by a specific wire . And sometimes devices are designed with extra protection for the hot wire , so that you do n't get shocked if something goes horribly wrong .

Cold air doesn't have a smell on its own. What you're probably noticing is the smell of things that the cold air is carrying. When the air is cold, it can help to preserve the scents of things in the environment, such as plants and trees. As the air warms up, those smells can become less noticeable because the molecules that carry the scents can move around more and become less concentrated. So when you breathe in cold air, you might be able to smell things more clearly because the cold is helping to keep the smells in place. Does that make sense?

The population of a country can be influenced by many factors, including fertility rates, life expectancy, and migration.

In the 20th century, the United States and China both had high fertility rates, which means that a lot of babies were being born. This contributed to their population increases.

On the other hand, countries like the United Kingdom, France, and Germany had lower fertility rates, which means that fewer babies were being born. This meant that their population growth was not as high.

Life expectancy, or how long people live, can also affect a country's population. If people in a country are living longer, there will be more people alive at any given time, which can contribute to population growth.

Migration, or people moving from one country to another, can also affect a country's population. If more people are moving into a country than moving out, the population of that country will increase. If more people are moving out than moving in, the population will decrease.

So, the population growth of different countries can be influenced by a combination of these factors.

We can approximate the earth as a radially symmetric sphere . This means that we can have layers , like the crust , mantle , etc , that have different average masses . We ignore things like a giant hunk of lead sitting somewhere . In this case , gravity works out such that anything above you cancels out . So if you dig down into the earth 1 mile , the gravitational pull of all of the stuff above you exactly cancels with everything on the other side of the earth . This means that , as you get closer to the center of the earth , the net pull on you decreases with the decrease of mass . If we assume that the earth does n't have layers , we can look at the volume as 4/3(pi)(r^3 ) . The force of gravity is directly proportional to the mass of an object , and inversely proportional to the square of the distance from the center . We can divide out the volume of the sphere to get a percentage of the mass at a certain distance compared to the full mass , with the distance factor thrown in : ( r_current^3 ) /(r_current^2 r_total^3 ) . This means that we will get a function that falls off from the maximum gravitational pull at the surface to zero , with a cubic curve . I 've taken the liberty of graphing this on Wolfram - Alpha [ here ] ( URL_0 ) . Note that layers will cause discontinuous jumps as they have different densities .

The law of diminishing returns is a concept in economics that explains how, as you increase the amount of a particular resource (like labor or capital) that is used in the production of a good or service, the additional output from that resource will eventually decrease. For example, let's say you own a bakery and you want to make more bread. You can do this by hiring more bakers or buying more ovens. At first, adding more bakers or ovens will help you produce more bread, but there is a point where adding more bakers or ovens will not increase the amount of bread you produce as much as it did before. This is because there are only so many bakers that can work in the bakery at the same time, and there is only so much space in the bakery to put more ovens. So, the law of diminishing returns says that there is a point where adding more of a particular resource will not increase the output as much as it did before. This is because there are limits to how much we can use a particular resource, and eventually we will reach a point where adding more of it will not make as much of a difference.

If you have N violins playing the same note , they wo n't all be playing in sync : each of theirs sounds forms a wave but the peaks and troughs of the waves do n't necessary match up with eachother even if their frequency is exactly the same . This means that the N violins are N times as loud as N individual violins . Instead they will be sqrt(N ) louder ( and then take into account that the decibels are logarithmic ) . Here 's a website on this : URL_0 Edit : I guess the ELI5 here is that if you put two violins together playing the same note , then you would add 3dB to the decibel level of a single violin . This +3 does n't depend upon how loud the violins were - whether each one was individually 10 dB or 100 dB , you 'd add 3 when you got the second one .

Les Misérables is a very emotional and powerful story about love, forgiveness, and the struggle for justice. The main character, Jean Valjean, is a man who has been imprisoned for many years for stealing a loaf of bread. After he is released from prison, he struggles to find a place in society and to live a good life. Along the way, he meets many different characters who all have their own struggles and hardships.

One of the main themes of the story is the idea that everyone makes mistakes, and that it is possible to change and become a better person. Valjean learns this lesson when he is forgiven by a kind bishop who helps him see the value of mercy and forgiveness. This message of hope and redemption can be very moving and inspiring to people who are struggling with their own challenges.

Another reason that Les Misérables is so deeply moving is that it deals with some very important and universal themes, such as the struggle for justice and the fight against oppression. The story takes place during a time of great political upheaval and social change in France, and it shows how ordinary people can make a difference in the world.

Overall, Les Misérables is a deeply moving and powerful story that speaks to the heart and soul of its audience. It is a tale of love, hope, and redemption that has touched the hearts of people all over the world.

A graphical model is a probabilistic model for representing the relationships between variables in a graph. Each variable is represented as a node in the graph, and the edges between the nodes represent the relationships between the variables. The graph encodes a set of conditional independencies between the variables, which means that the probability distribution of the variables can be represented compactly by only specifying the values of the variables that are directly connected by edges in the graph.



Graphical models are used to represent and reason about complex systems in which the relationships between the variables are uncertain or hard to quantify. They are a useful tool for modeling and analyzing data, particularly in the fields of machine learning, statistical modeling, and artificial intelligence.



There are two main types of graphical models: directed graphical models, also known as Bayesian networks, and undirected graphical models, also known as Markov random fields. In a directed graphical model, the edges in the graph represent a causal relationship between the variables, while in an undirected graphical model, the edges represent a statistical relationship between the variables.



Graphical models provide a powerful framework for representing and reasoning about complex systems, and have been applied to a wide range of problems, including speech recognition, image classification, natural language processing, and many others.

In the case of the tire in the video you linked, it appears that the tire is changing direction because it is actually changing direction. There are several potential causes for missed or irregular periods other than pregnancy, including:

Stress: Stress can disrupt the balance of hormones in the body, leading to irregular periods.

Weight changes: Significant changes in weight, either gain or loss, can affect menstruation.

Polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS): PCOS is a hormonal disorder that can cause irregular periods and other symptoms like excess facial and body hair, acne, and weight gain.

Thyroid problems: An overactive or underactive thyroid gland can cause menstrual changes.

Certain medications: Some medications, such as antipsychotics and antidepressants, can disrupt periods.

Perimenopause: As women approach menopause, their periods may become irregular.

It is important to speak to a healthcare provider about your missed periods and any other symptoms you are experiencing. They can help determine the cause and recommend appropriate treatment.

Short links and long links both have their own purpose and advantages. Short links are often used as a way to condense and simplify a longer, more complicated link. They can be easier to remember and share, especially if you are trying to share a link through a platform that has limited space for characters (like Twitter). Long links, on the other hand, can provide more detailed information about the content of the link. They may include specific parameters or codes that help identify the content or help with tracking and analytics. Long links can also be more secure, as they may include additional information to verify the authenticity of the link. Overall, it really depends on the situation and the needs of the person using the link. Both short and long links can be useful in different circumstances.

To find out the minimum due payment and due date for your ANZ Visa credit card, you can follow these steps:Go to the ANZ website and log in to your account.Once you are logged in, click on the "Cards" tab on the top menu.Click on the name of the credit card for which you want to find the minimum due payment and due date.You will see a summary of your credit card account, including the current balance, minimum due payment, and due date.If you need more information about your credit card account, you can click on the "View account details" link to see a detailed breakdown of your account activity, including any transactions, payments, and fees.It's important to pay at least the minimum due payment by the due date to avoid late fees and to maintain a good credit score. If you have any questions about your credit card account or need help making a payment, you can contact ANZ customer service for assistance.

When you short a stock, you borrow shares from someone else and sell them on the market. You are selling the shares at the current market price. The ask price is the lowest price at which someone is willing to sell a particular stock. If you want to sell a stock that you own, you would sell it at the ask price. However, when you short a stock, you are borrowing the shares and selling them, so you are not selling at the ask price. Instead, you are selling at the current market price, which may be higher or lower than the ask price.For example, let's say that the current market price for a particular stock is $100, and the best (lowest) ask price is $99. If you want to sell a stock that you own, you would sell it at the ask price of $99. However, if you want to short the stock, you would borrow shares of the stock and sell them at the current market price of $100. You would then need to repurchase the shares at a later date to close the short position.

Sure! Slugging percentage is a statistic that measures the power of a hitter in baseball. It's calculated by adding the number of singles, two times the number of doubles, three times the number of triples, and four times the number of home runs hit by a player, and dividing that total by the number of times that player has come up to bat (also known as their at-bats). For example, let's say a player named Joe has come up to bat 100 times in a season. He has hit 20 singles, 10 doubles, 5 triples, and 2 home runs. To calculate his slugging percentage, we would do the following: Add up the total number of bases that Joe has gotten from his hits: 20 singles * 1 base + 10 doubles * 2 bases + 5 triples * 3 bases + 2 home runs * 4 bases = 80 bases, Divide the number of bases by the number of at-bats: 80 bases / 100 at-bats = 0.8 Convert the decimal to a percentage by multiplying by 100: 0.8 * 100 = 80%, So, Joe's slugging percentage for the season would be 80%. The higher the slugging percentage, the more powerful the hitter is considered to be.

Chronic bronchitis is a type of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) that is characterized by inflammation and swelling of the bronchial tubes, which can lead to persistent coughing and difficulty breathing. It is often caused by long-term exposure to irritants such as tobacco smoke, air pollution, and other harmful substances.

There is no known cure for chronic bronchitis, but it can be managed with a combination of lifestyle changes and medical treatment. Some steps you can take to manage your chronic bronchitis include:

Quit smoking: If you smoke, quitting is the most important thing you can do to improve your lung health and manage your chronic bronchitis.

Avoid exposure to irritants: Try to avoid exposure to irritants such as pollution, smoke, and other substances that can worsen your symptoms.

Exercise regularly: Exercise can help improve your lung function and overall health.

Get vaccinated: Getting vaccinated against the flu and pneumonia can help prevent respiratory infections that can exacerbate your chronic bronchitis.

Take medications as prescribed: Your doctor may prescribe medications to help control your symptoms and prevent flare-ups. It's important to take these medications as directed.

Practice good hygiene: Washing your hands frequently and avoiding close contact with people who are sick can help prevent respiratory infections.

These two numbers are like the components of a vector. The vector itself is the combination of both the magnitude (5 miles north) and the direction (north).

Vectors can be added and subtracted from each other. For example, if you had a vector representing a toy's location and another vector representing the toy's movement, you could add them together to find the toy's new location.

Bilirubin total is a blood test that measures the total amount of bilirubin in the body. Bilirubin is a yellowish substance that is produced when the body breaks down old red blood cells. It is carried by the bloodstream to the liver, where it is processed and excreted from the body in the bile.\n\nElevated levels of bilirubin in the blood, known as hyperbilirubinemia, can be a sign of liver problems, such as hepatitis or cirrhosis, or other conditions that affect the red blood cells, such as hemolytic anemia. A bilirubin total test may be ordered as part of a liver function panel or as part of a general health examination. The normal range for bilirubin total is typically 0.3 to 1.9 milligrams per deciliter (mg/dL).

The grooves in gravel roads, also called "rumble strips," serve a few different purposes.

One purpose is to alert drivers when they are veering off the road or onto the shoulder. These grooves create a loud noise and vibration when a vehicle drives over them, which can grab a driver's attention and help them stay on the road.

Another purpose of the grooves is to slow down vehicles. When a car drives over the grooves, it can cause the vehicle to shake and slow down slightly. This can help keep traffic moving at a safer speed, especially on winding or narrow roads.

Finally, the grooves can help improve the overall safety of the road by increasing the traction and stability of the surface. When rain or other weather conditions make the road slick, the grooves can help provide more grip for the tires of the vehicles driving on it.

Overall, the grooves in gravel roads serve to make the road safer for everyone using it.

Dividing by zero is not allowed in mathematics because it is impossible for any number to be multiplied by zero to equal a given number.

Imagine you have a bag of apples and you want to divide them equally among a certain number of people. If you have zero people, then it is impossible to divide the apples among them because there is nothing to divide the apples between. Similarly, if you try to divide any number by zero, it is impossible to determine what the result should be because there is nothing to divide the number by.

In mathematics, we use the term "undefined" to describe something that is not defined or cannot be calculated. Division by zero is undefined because it is not possible to calculate a meaningful result.

I wrote my final work at university about localisation with wireless networks . The problem with it is it sucks . You can talk it pretty and i did it a lot in my work because i wanted it to sound good and usable . But if you have any other possibility of localisation it is a lot better than triangulation with WiFi networks . But there is one important reason to use it , indoor navigation . As soon as you enter a building you will most likely lose your GPS signal and your great localisation ability . And Wifi is a great way to close this localization gap . And it is good enough to tell you in which room you are ( as long as you are in bigger rooms ) but errors of 5 meters or more are something that will happen a lot . The main problem with Wifi localization is that it 's usually done by checking the signal strength of the wifi network and it differs a lot , it depends on weather , humidity , materials used and even how many people are around . It 's really hard to make a model that takes all of those factors into consideration and is able to give a good localization result . In addition to that there 's the problem that modern routers usually have some kind of energy saving option that will disturb your measurements even more . There may be some exceptions to this , some museums / supermarkets have a very controlled area where weather / humidity and routers do n't change that often . This allows you to have a rather good localization indoors . Another possibility of improving your localization would be the pure mass of wifi networks , for example in a skyscraper filled with flats and wifi networks - the pure mass of information will give you a rather good position . And in both of those cases GPS is n't available or a viable option to rely on , which makes WiFi not only the best but the only way to locate your phone . Edit : and of course to use WiFi to locate your phone you need to have a database that tells you where all the different WiFi routers are . It may come from Google cars or a supermarket may provide the exact positions . For better advertisement or guided museum tours , where the WiFi is set up to be used as a localization tool . And i should mention that you can use special algorithems that fuse gps and wifi localization but if you compare the additional energy consumption you need to the improvement in your position it 's usually not worth it at all . Even though a small improvement can be achieved even when you use gps , basically a computer can guess how wrong both gps and wifi are and calculate some kind of average to get the best of both . But best of both is usually GPS .

Training data is a set of data used to train a machine learning model. The goal of training a machine learning model is to find patterns in the training data that can be used to make predictions on new, unseen data.



In order to train a machine learning model, you need to provide it with a large set of labeled examples. Each example consists of a set of input features and a corresponding output label. For example, in a machine learning model for image classification, the input features might be the pixels of an image, and the output label might be the class to which the image belongs (such as "cat," "dog," "car," etc.).



The machine learning model uses these labeled examples to learn the patterns in the data that are associated with each output label. Once the model has been trained, it can then be used to make predictions on new, unseen examples by applying the patterns it learned during training to the new data.



Training data is a crucial part of the machine learning process, as the quality and quantity of the training data will directly impact the accuracy and performance of the resulting machine learning model.

Legal financing refers to the practice of providing financial assistance to individuals or businesses to help cover the costs of legal fees and expenses associated with a legal matter. This can include costs such as hiring an attorney, paying for court fees and expert witness fees, and other costs related to pursuing or defending a legal claim.Legal financing can take various forms, such as loans, legal financing agreements, and contingency fee arrangements. In a legal financing agreement, a company or individual provides funding in exchange for a percentage of the proceeds or settlement from the legal matter. Contingency fee arrangements allow individuals to hire an attorney on a contingency basis, where the attorney is paid a percentage of the proceeds or settlement from the case if it is successful.Legal financing can be useful for individuals or businesses who are unable to afford the upfront costs of pursuing a legal matter, or who may not have the resources to pay for legal fees on an ongoing basis. It can also be useful for cases that are expected to be complex or time-consuming, as it allows individuals or businesses to focus on their legal matter without having to worry about the financial burden.It is important to carefully consider the terms of any legal financing agreement and to understand the potential risks and benefits of using legal financing. It is also important to carefully review the fees and terms of any attorney or legal service provider that you are considering hiring, as these can vary significantly.

President Richard Nixon resigned from office on August 9, 1974. As the scandal unfolded, Nixon faced increasing pressure to resign, and he eventually chose to do so rather than face impeachment proceedings in the House of Representatives and a trial in the Senate. Vice President Gerald Ford succeeded Nixon as President and took the oath of office on the same day.

When a limit order is placed on an exchange, it is entered into the order book for a particular trading pair. The limit order will remain in the order book until it is either filled or canceled.When another user places a market order, the exchange will attempt to match the order with the best available limit order(s) in the order book. If the market order can be fully filled by a single limit order, then the trade will be executed and the limit order will be removed from the order book. If the market order cannot be fully filled by a single limit order, then it will be partially filled and the limit order will be updated to reflect the remaining amount.If the market order cannot be filled by any of the limit orders in the order book, it will be added to the order book as a new limit order. The exchange will then continue to try to match the order with any incoming market orders or other limit orders.It's worth noting that the specific details of how exchanges match orders can vary. Some exchanges use a price-time priority system, which means that orders with the best price are given priority and orders that were placed earlier are given priority over orders placed later. Other exchanges may use different systems for matching orders.

Shampoo is designed to clean your hair, but it also has other functions. For example, it can help to remove excess oils from your scalp and hair, improve the texture and manageability of your hair, and add volume and shine.

However, soap can be harsh on the hair and scalp because it can strip away the natural oils that keep your hair and scalp healthy. This is why shampoo is formulated with a different blend of ingredients that are gentler on the hair and scalp, but still effective at cleaning.

Many shampoos also contain conditioning agents that help to detangle and smooth the hair, as well as fragrances and other ingredients that can improve the overall appearance and smell of the hair. These additional ingredients are what make shampoo different from soap, and they help to make shampoo a more effective and pleasant product for washing your hair.

NFL Films is a company that produces television programs and documentaries about the National Football League (NFL). The company was founded in 1962 by Ed Sabol, who was a filmmaker and football fan. Launching a rocket into space is more difficult than launching an airplane because rockets have to travel much higher and faster.

Airplanes only need to fly through the Earth's atmosphere, which is the layer of air around our planet. But rockets have to leave the Earth's atmosphere and travel all the way to space, where there is no air at all.

To do this, rockets need a lot of powerful engines and fuel. The engines have to burn very hot and produce a lot of force to lift the rocket off the ground and into the air. And the rocket needs enough fuel to keep the engines burning for a long time, so it can reach the high speeds and heights it needs to get to space.

Rockets also have to be built very carefully and tested thoroughly to make sure they can withstand the extreme conditions of space travel. This includes being able to withstand the intense heat and pressure of the launch, as well as the freezing cold and vacuum of space.

All of these factors make launching a rocket much more complex and difficult than launching an airplane. But it is also a very exciting and rewarding achievement, because it allows us to explore and learn more about the universe around us.

Here 's the explanation I 've gotten : imagine you 've been storing firewood in the shed behind your house . You do n't have much to store , since you live in a pretty cold area and you usually do n't have too much to spare . This works for a while , and so you get used to just throwing whatever spare you have into your storage area , since there 's basically no way you 'll ever have enough to really need any sort of organization or anything like that . One day , however , you start getting more firewood . WAY more firewood . So much that you could n't possibly burn all of it , so you start putting a lot more in storage . You 're pretty used to just chucking it into your shed by this point , so you just do that . This continues for a while , until , oh shit , your shed is overfull and things are starting to get cramped , to the point that you 've started storing wood in your house , too . Even though it 's starting to get in the way , you never learned how to handle this situation , since you figured there was no way you would ever have this much spare wood . In this analogy , firewood is analogous to calories , carbohydrates , etc . All the stuff we store as fat . Since our bodies evolved never having access to the amount of foods we have now , they never really had the chance to figure out how to store all this stuff , and so when there 's too much it starts to get in the way of the body 's functioning .

Vector art is a type of digital artwork that is created using mathematical equations and lines, rather than pixels. These lines and shapes are called "vectors," and they can be easily resized and scaled without losing any quality.

In a regular picture, the color values for each pixel are stored in a grid, and when you zoom in or resize the image, you can see the individual pixels and the image becomes pixelated. With vector art, the lines and shapes are not made up of pixels, so they don't become pixelated when you zoom in or resize the image.

Imagine you have a picture of a house. In a regular picture, the house is made up of tiny squares called pixels, and each pixel has a specific color value. If you zoom in on the house, you can see the individual pixels and the house starts to look blocky and pixelated.

With vector art, the house is not made up of pixels. Instead, it's made up of lines and shapes that are created using math. When you zoom in on the vector art house, the lines and shapes stay smooth and clean, because they are not made up of pixels. This is why vector art looks good when it's scaled up or down – it's not made up of pixels, so it doesn't become pixelated.

It's common for people to feel like they sound better when singing in the shower because the acoustics in a shower can make your voice sound different. The sound of your voice can be affected by the space around you and how the sound waves bounce off the walls and surfaces in that space. In the shower, the sound waves bounce off the hard, flat surfaces of the walls and floor, which can make your voice sound louder and more echo-y. This can make it feel like your voice is carrying better and that you're able to hit the notes more easily. So it's not just your imagination – the way your voice sounds in the shower really is different from how it sounds in other spaces.

There are a few factors that can contribute to a smaller engine car outperforming a car with a bigger engine. Here are a few possible explanations: Weight: A lighter car will generally be able to accelerate faster and handle better than a heavier car, even if it has a smaller engine. Power-to-weight ratio: This is a measure of how much power a car's engine produces relative to its weight. A car with a higher power-to-weight ratio will be able to accelerate faster than a car with a lower power-to-weight ratio, even if it has a smaller engine. Transmission: The transmission is the part of the car that helps the engine deliver power to the wheels. A car with a more efficient transmission will be able to make better use of its engine's power, which can help it outperform a car with a larger engine but a less efficient transmission. Aerodynamics: The shape of a car can affect how much drag it experiences as it moves through the air. A financial advisor can help you with a wide range of financial tasks and decisions, including creating a budget, saving for retirement, paying off debt, investing, and planning for major financial goals such as buying a house or saving for your child's education. They can also help you understand your financial options and make informed decisions about your financial future.Whether or not it is worth the money to work with a financial advisor depends on your individual circumstances and financial goals. Some people may feel comfortable managing their own finances and may not need the assistance of a financial advisor. It is generally not advisable to borrow against your Individual Retirement Account (IRA) to pay off debt or make purchases such as a car. IRA accounts are intended to provide financial resources for your retirement, and borrowing against them can jeopardize your future financial security.In general, you are not allowed to borrow money from an IRA. However, some types of IRAs, such as Roth IRAs, do allow you to take out contributions that you have made to the account without penalty. However, any earnings on those contributions may be subject to taxes and a 10% penalty if you are under the age of 59 1/2.If you are in debt and need to make a large purchase, it may be better to consider other options such as taking out a loan or using a credit card. It is important to carefully consider all of your options and to seek financial advice from a qualified professional before making any decisions about your financial situation.

If you are considering a private loan with the sale of a vehicle, there are a few key steps you should follow:Determine the value of the vehicle: Before you can determine the terms of the loan, you need to know how much the vehicle is worth. You can use a resource like Kelley Blue Book to get an estimate of the vehicle's value.Agree on the terms of the loan: Once you know the value of the vehicle, you and the borrower should agree on the terms of the loan, including the amount of the loan, the interest rate, and the length of the loan.Create a written agreement: It is important to create a written agreement outlining the terms of the loan. This should include the amount of the loan, the interest rate, the length of the loan, and any other relevant terms, such as the borrower's obligations to maintain and insure the vehicle.Transfer ownership of the vehicle: In order to secure the loan, you will need to transfer ownership of the vehicle to the borrower. You should make sure that the borrower has adequate insurance coverage in place before you transfer ownership of the vehicle.Keep records of the transaction: It is important to keep thorough records of the loan transaction, including the written agreement and any documentation related to the transfer of ownership. This will help to protect your interests in the event of a dispute.

" Cleaning " is a very undescriptive term in the computer world . In most cases , it indicates stuff like deleting temporary files ( files programs create while running but do n't need ) , deleting old versions of programs that are left behind after updating , emptying the recycle bin , and otherwise deleting files that accumulate on your hard drive but are not necessary . Windows machines have a built - in tool that can take care of most of that automatically ( called " Disk Cleanup " ) . I 'm less familiar with Mac and Linux , but I would n't be surprised if they both also had similar tools . In general , this sort of cleanup can free up some disk space , though it 's unlikely to give a large amount back . Other than that , it does n't provide any other benefit . As a side note , if you want to free up even more disk space and/or make your computer run faster , I suggest uninstalling any programs you have but do n't use . This includes a lot of the bloatware that gets prepackaged with many computers , which tends to be unnecessary . Any program that starts automatically when you turn on your computer is an especially good target , as those will run constantly and take up some computer resources all the time . If you do n't want to uninstall them , you might consider disabling their " run on startup " feature if you do n't need them running all the time , usually found in a settings menu somewhere .

Benjamin Graham, considered the father of value investing, developed a framework for stock selection that he outlined in his book "The Intelligent Investor." In the book, Graham introduced the concept of the "defensive investor," who is focused on minimizing risk and maximizing the likelihood of earning a satisfactory return on their investment.One key criterion that Graham recommended for the defensive investor is to look for stocks with a high earnings-per-share (EPS) ratio. According to Graham, the EPS ratio should be at least twice the current long-term bond yield, which is a measure of the yield on long-term government bonds. This means that if the long-term bond yield is 3%, the EPS ratio should be at least 6%.In addition to the EPS ratio, Graham also recommended looking for stocks with a high dividend yield, a strong balance sheet, and a long track record of stability and reliability. These characteristics can help reduce the risk of investing in stocks and increase the likelihood of earning a satisfactory return.

Happiness and mouths go together for babies . They are too young to separate ' being fed makes my mouth feel full and makes me feel warm and happy ' from ' I feel warm and happy , better fill my mouth ' . It 's the same as , in slightly older children , the confusion between ' I slept well and also this blanket is always there ' and ' the blanket means I sleep well ' . It 's a pattern - finding thing our brain does from before birth that explains why we find certain types of music comforting , or believe superstitions about black cats , and why we see faces in trees . It 's the great strength of the human brain - making associations outside of immediate cause and effect allowed us to know since prehistory that sex led to babies and that seeds lead to trees - but it also has a ton of side effects . One of which is babies sucking their tiny balled - up fists with joy .

\nWhen a plane is flying at high altitudes, the air inside the cabin is pressurized to help us breathe and feel comfortable. However, when the plane is ascending or descending, the cabin pressure can change. This change in pressure can cause the air inside your middle ear to expand or contract. The eustachian tube, which is a small passageway in your ear, helps to equalize the pressure on both sides of your eardrum. When the pressure changes, the eustachian tube can open and close to let air in or out of your middle ear, which can cause a "popping" sensation. So, even though the cabin is pressurized, the pressure can still change during the flight and cause your ears to pop. Does that make sense?

It is possible to fund a scholarship in perpetuity through a variety of methods. The endowment is invested in a diversified portfolio of assets, and the income generated from these investments is used to fund the scholarship on an ongoing basis.Another approach is to create a charitable trust or foundation that is dedicated to supporting the scholarship program. This can be done by raising funds from donors or through other fundraising efforts, and the trust or foundation can then use these funds to provide financial support for the scholarship on an ongoing basis.It is also possible to establish a scholarship program that is funded through a combination of endowment income and annual fundraising efforts. Because for that moment where it stops , the speed of the tire matches the frequency that the camera takes pictures . Let 's say that the camera records at 60 FPS . If the wheel is slower , then with each loop it will fall ever so slightly behind and it will appear to rotate backwards slowly . If it is faster , then it will similarly rotate forward .

A citizen's arrest is when a person who is not a law enforcement officer arrests someone they believe has committed a crime. In some countries, it is legal for a citizen to make an arrest if they witness a crime being committed, or if they have reasonable grounds to believe that a crime has been committed and that the person they are arresting is responsible for it. To perform a citizen's arrest, you should first try to find a law enforcement officer and tell them what you have witnessed or what you suspect has happened. If a law enforcement officer is not available, you can try to detain the person yourself, but you should be very careful and try to stay safe. Here are some things to keep in mind if you decide to make a citizen's arrest: Make sure you are confident that a crime has actually been committed and that the person you are arresting is responsible for it. If you are not sure, it is best to let the police handle the situation. Do not use more force than is necessary to detain the person. You should not physically harm the person or use weapons. Stay calm and try to keep the situation under control. Do not get into an argument or confrontation with the person you are arresting. Try to get other people to help you, if possible. It is safer to have more than one person present when making a citizen's arrest. Call the police as soon as you can and let them know what is happening. They will be able to take over and handle the situation properly. Overall, it is generally best to leave the job of arresting people to the police. They are trained to handle these situations and are better equipped to do so safely. If you do decide to make a citizen's arrest, make sure you are confident that a crime has been committed and that the person you are arresting is responsible for it, and use only the amount of force necessary to detain the person safely.

After World War I, the countries in western Europe were trying to rebuild and recover from the damage and loss of life that had occurred during the war. They were also trying to prevent another war from happening. To do this, they made a treaty called the Treaty of Versailles which limited the size and power of the German military so that it couldn't start a war again.

However, the German leader at the time, Adolf Hitler, did not agree with the Treaty of Versailles and wanted to build up the German military again. He also had a plan to take over other countries and expand the territory of Germany. Many people in other countries did not believe that Hitler would try to start a war, and they did not take his threats seriously. They were also busy with their own problems and did not want to get involved in another conflict.

When Hitler began to invade other countries, many of them were caught off guard and were not prepared to defend themselves. They did not have strong enough armies or enough weapons to fight back against the well-trained and well-equipped German military. As a result, Germany was able to sweep across much of Europe and take control of many countries with little resistance.

Assuming you know how to physically work a washer and dryer , it 's more about what you * do n't * do . * Do n't combine deep or bright colors ( reds in particular ) with whites or light colors , or they 'll bleed and ruin your whites . Combining different dark colors ( a dark red and a dark blue shirt , for instance ) is generally fine . * Hotter water gets your clothes cleaner but makes the colors more likely to bleed . Personally , the only clothes I wash in hot water are socks and white undershirts ( in the same load ) and jeans . Stick with cold water for anything made of wool , anything with both light and dark colors ( striped shirt , for instance ) , and delicates . Warm is fine for just about anything else . * Hang up sweaters and delicates to dry if possible ; if not , dry with low or no heat . Medium heat is fine for anything else . Keep the lint trap ( usually just inside the door near the bottom ) as clean as possible .

To optimize the return on dividends, you can follow these steps:Determine your investment goals and risk tolerance: Your investment goals and risk tolerance will help you determine how much of your portfolio should be invested in dividend-paying stocks. For example, if you are looking for a steady stream of income and are willing to take on more risk, you may want to allocate a larger portion of your portfolio to dividend-paying stocks.Research potential investments: Look for companies with a track record of steady or growing dividends. Consider factors such as the company's financial stability, growth prospects, and management quality. You can also look for companies with a high dividend yield, which is the annual dividend per share divided by the stock price.Diversify your portfolio: Don't put all your eggs in one basket. Diversify your portfolio by investing in a variety of dividend-paying stocks in different sectors and industries. This will help reduce risk and increase the chances of earning a steady stream of income.Monitor your investments: Keep track of your investments and the dividends they are paying. Be aware of any changes in the company's financial performance or dividend policy, as this could affect your return on dividends.Review your portfolio regularly: Periodically review your portfolio to ensure it aligns with your investment goals and risk tolerance. If necessary, make adjustments to optimize your return on dividends.It's important to note that investing in stocks carries risks, and you should always do your due diligence before making any investment decisions. It's also a good idea to consult with a financial advisor or professional for personalized advice.

A role-playing game (RPG) is a type of game in which players assume the roles of fictional characters and act out their actions within a predetermined set of rules. These games can be played face-to-face, online, or through a combination of both.

In a role-playing game, each player typically creates a character to play as, and then collaborates with the other players to create a story. The story can be guided by a game master or facilitator, who helps to set the scene and provide direction, or it can be more open-ended, with players improvising and reacting to events as they unfold.

Role-playing games can take many different forms, including tabletop games, live action role-playing games (LARPs), and computer-based games. Some popular examples of role-playing games include Dungeons & Dragons, World of Warcraft, and The Elder Scrolls series.

Gravity is the force that attracts two objects with mass towards each other. The strength of gravity depends on the mass of the objects and the distance between them. So, if you are standing on the surface of the Earth, the Earth's mass is pulling you towards its center with a certain amount of force.

The Earth's mass is not evenly distributed throughout its interior. It is denser and heavier at the core, and less dense and lighter towards the surface. This means that the mass pulling you towards the center of the Earth is not the same all the way through. It is stronger closer to the core and weaker closer to the surface.

So, if you were at the core of the Earth, the mass pulling you towards the center would be much greater than it is at the surface. But, because you are much closer to the center, the distance between you and the mass is much smaller. This means that the force of gravity at the core of the Earth is actually weaker than it is at the surface, even though the mass pulling you towards the center is much greater.

In sign language, there isn't a sign for every single name in the world like there is in spoken languages. Instead, to spell out a person's name, each letter of the alphabet has a corresponding sign that is used. For example, to spell the name "Katie" in sign language, the sign for "K" would be used, followed by the sign for "A", followed by the sign for "T", and so on.

Sometimes, if a person's name is very long or difficult to spell out using the alphabet signs, a nickname or shorter version of the name might be used instead. For example, if a person's name is "Elizabeth," they might be known by the nickname "Liz" in sign language.

Overall, the way names work in sign language is similar to how they work in spoken languages, but there are some differences in how they are represented.

Abnormalities , or an imbalance in the neurotransmitter , or brain chemical , serotonin , could also be to blame . Medications known as Selective Serotonin Re - uptake Inhibitors ( SSRIs ) are often used to treat OCD , although it is not fully known why the SSRI medications seem to help some people with OCD . When a person is in the water, the buoyancy of their body helps them stay afloat. The buoyancy is the upward force that the water exerts on the person's body, and it is caused by the water's density being greater than the density of the air.

The buoyancy of a person's body is affected by their weight, as well as their body composition and the way they are positioned in the water. When a person is carrying weights, the additional weight can make it harder for them to stay afloat. This is because the buoyancy of their body is reduced by the weight of the weights, and they may sink lower in the water.

On the other hand, if a person is overweight, they may actually have an easier time staying afloat because their body has more fat, which is less dense than muscle and bone. This means that the buoyancy of their body may be greater, which can help them float more easily.

It's important to note that even if a person is overweight, they still need to be able to swim and have good control over their body in the water in order to stay safe. Drowning can happen to anyone, regardless of their weight or body composition, so it's important for everyone to know how to swim and to be cautious when around water.

Light does not have mass, but it does have energy. Black holes are objects with extremely strong gravitational forces. The gravitational force of a black hole is so strong that it can pull in even light, which has no mass. Here's how it works: Imagine you are standing on a hill and you roll a ball down the hill. As the ball rolls downhill, it picks up speed. Now imagine that the ball is a beam of light, and the hill is a black hole. As the light beam gets closer to the black hole, it feels the strong gravitational force pulling it in. Just like the ball rolling downhill picked up speed, the light beam gains energy as it gets closer to the black hole. This extra energy causes the light beam to move faster and faster, and eventually it gets sucked into the black hole. It's important to note that not all light gets sucked into a black hole. Only light that gets too close to the black hole will feel its strong gravitational force. Light that is farther away will not be affected.

SteamOS is a free operating system based on the Linux kernel that was developed by Valve, the company behind the Steam gaming platform. It was designed specifically to be used as an operating system for living room devices such as TV-connected game consoles and HTPCs (Home Theater PCs).

There are a few key differences between SteamOS and Windows that may make it a better choice for some users:

Performance: SteamOS is designed to be lightweight and efficient, which may make it run faster and more smoothly on lower-end hardware than a full-featured operating system like Windows. This could be particularly useful if you are using an older or lower-powered PC to play games.

Cost: SteamOS is free to download and use, while Windows requires a license to use. This can be a significant cost savings for some users.

Living room focus: SteamOS is designed to be used on devices that are connected to a TV and controlled with a game controller or other input device, rather than a traditional keyboard and mouse. This makes it a good choice for use in a living room or home theater setting.

Game support: SteamOS includes support for a wide variety of games, including many that are not available on other platforms. This means that you may be able to access a larger library of games by using SteamOS.

Overall, whether or not SteamOS is a good choice for you will depend on your specific needs and preferences. If you are looking for a free, lightweight operating system that is optimized for use in a living room setting and has a large selection of games available, SteamOS may be a good option to consider.

If you always rationalise denominators , it 's a bit easier to see when things have common denominators and a bit easier to make them have common denominators or when they can be written more simply without a denominator at all . ( eg 1/(1 + sqrt2)=sqrt2 - 1 ) Pure mathly , there 's actually some questions as to what 1 / sqrt2 even means . Division as you probably saw it up to this point was " take m things and split them evenly into n groups " , so what does it mean to have sqrt2 groups ? Obviously , this is n't the full definition of division , but writing 1 / sqrt2 requires you to know a " harder " form of division whereas it is clear from the outset what sqrt2/2 means . The offshoot of that point is , without using a calculator , what are the values of : 1 / 1.41421356 and 1.41421356 / 2 You should see immediately that one of these is WAY easier to work out . However , you would be correct to say that no one really works these out by hand any more , and calculators and computers do n't seem to have much trouble either way , so yes it is mostly aesthetics and old timeyness . Keep in mind that the math curriculums of any high school have stupidly not changed in about 300 years , and so the surprising thing is that they no longer teach you how to use a slide rule .

Neural networks are a software based problem solving tool that are inspired from how the brain works . Brains are made of neurons , which are connected to each other to send electrical signals . Each neuron makes a small change to the signal before passing it on and somehow eventually the signal becomes the answer . Neural networks are like that . They are made by arranging a large numbers of really small programs in a network . Each small programs can only change the answer it got from another small programs in a tiny way . So you start with a lot of presolved question answer pairs . Things like ( 2,2 = 4 ) , ( 1,4=5) .... etc . and now you make the tiny programs modify what they will do to their answers again and again millions of times until you start getting the right answer . This is called the ' training ' stage . If all goes well , the network of small programs will end up such that even when you give it a question it never saw before ( 1,3 ? ) , It will come up with the right answer ( 4 ) . The neural network has * learnt * addition . Even though you did n't exactly tell it to add , whatever the tiny programs have ended up doing , the net result is that they do addition . This becomes really useful for complex problems when we have only question answer pairs but have no idea how the answers are derived from the questions . Like how the temperature and wind are related to storms . Neural networks pick up patterns in such problems ( even if we do n't see them ) and give us the right answer .

Sure! The butterfly effect is a concept that says small things can have big effects. It's named after the idea that a butterfly flapping its wings in one part of the world could eventually cause a tornado in another part of the world. Imagine that you have a big jar filled with water and some leaves floating on top. If you blow on one of the leaves, it might move a little bit. But if you keep blowing, it can cause all of the leaves to move around and create a little "storm" in the jar. This is similar to how the butterfly effect works. A small change in one part of a system (like the jar) can have big effects on other parts of the system (like the leaves). This can happen in all sorts of systems, like the weather, economics, and even the way people behave. So even though a butterfly flapping its wings might seem like a small and insignificant event, it can actually have a big impact on the world around us.

There are various types of investment accounts that you can choose from, depending on your financial goals, risk tolerance, and investment horizon. Some common types of investment accounts include:Individual retirement accounts (IRAs): IRAs are tax-advantaged accounts that allow you to save for retirement. There are two main types of IRAs: Traditional IRAs and Roth IRAs. Traditional IRAs offer tax deductions for contributions, while Roth IRAs allow you to contribute after-tax dollars and withdraw your contributions and earnings tax-free in retirement.401(k) plans: 401(k) plans are employer-sponsored retirement savings plans that allow you to contribute a portion of your salary on a tax-deferred basis. Many employers also offer matching contributions, which can help boost your savings.Brokerage accounts: A brokerage account is a type of investment account that allows you to buy and sell securities such as stocks, bonds, and mutual funds. Brokerage accounts can be either taxable or tax-advantaged, depending on the type of securities you hold and the account structure.Mutual fund accounts: A mutual fund is a type of investment vehicle that pools together money from many investors and uses it to buy a diversified portfolio of stocks, bonds, or other securities. You can open a mutual fund account at a brokerage firm or directly with a mutual fund company.Education savings accounts: Education savings accounts, also known as 529 plans, are tax-advantaged accounts that allow you to save for a child's education expenses, including tuition, fees, and other education-related expenses.Health savings accounts (HSAs): HSAs are tax-advantaged accounts that allow you to save for medical expenses, including deductibles, copays, and other qualified medical expenses. HSAs are only available to individuals who are enrolled in high-deductible health plans.It's important to carefully consider your financial goals and risk tolerance when choosing an investment account. You may also want to consider consulting with a financial advisor or professional to determine the best options for your situation.

The United States is a sovereign country and, as such, is not subject to the jurisdiction of the International Court of Justice (ICJ), which is the primary judicial branch of the United Nations and the world's highest international court. The ICJ has jurisdiction over disputes between states, but it does not have the power to hear cases involving individual countries without their consent.

The United States has not ratified the Optional Protocol to the Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations, which gives the ICJ jurisdiction to hear cases brought by one state against another. As a result, the United States is not bound by the ICJ's decisions and cannot be sued at the court without its consent.

It is worth noting that the United States has participated in some cases before the ICJ and has accepted the court's jurisdiction in certain limited circumstances, such as when it has agreed to submit to the court's jurisdiction as part of a treaty or other international agreement. However, the United States has not accepted the ICJ's jurisdiction to hear cases involving its conduct as a sovereign state.

Filmmakers can take shots in front of mirrors without having the camera being in the reflection by using a technique called "keyhole blocking." This involves carefully positioning the camera and the actors in the scene so that the camera is hidden behind a small gap, such as a gap between two objects or a door that is slightly open. This allows the camera to capture the action in the scene without being reflected in the mirror.

Another way to avoid having the camera reflected in the mirror is to use a special type of mirror called a one-way mirror. A one-way mirror is a mirror that is partially transparent, meaning that it is possible to see through it from one side but not from the other. If the camera is positioned on the side of the one-way mirror where it is possible to see through it, the camera will not be reflected in the mirror.

Sometimes, filmmakers will also use computer-generated imagery (CGI) to remove the camera or other crew members from the reflection in the mirror. This can be done by digitally replacing the reflection in the mirror with the desired image.

Overall, there are several different ways that filmmakers can take shots in front of mirrors without having the camera reflected in the mirror, including keyhole blocking, using one-way mirrors, and using CGI.

Its been a while , but valid is asking about the form of an argument and sound is asking if it stands up to the real world . All people named Tom are evil . My cousin is named Tom . Therefore my cousin is evil . That is a valid argument form ( all A are C. B is A. Therefore B is C. However , the argument is n't sound because it is nt true that all Tom 's are evil . An invalid argument is one where the form is n't right . Halloween is a holiday . Tomorrow is a holiday . Therefore tomorrow is halloween . That is an invalid argument . ( 1 A is B , tomorrow is a B. Therefore tomorrow is A ) . Now , it might just so happen that tomorrow by luck is Halloween . But it could also be Christmas or Boxing day in canada . So valid says nothing about the truth or untruth of the conclusion , just that the argument is n't airtight .

Gold and silver coins and rounds are both forms of physical precious metal currency. However, there are some key differences between the two.Coins:Issued by a government: Gold and silver coins are typically issued by a government as official legal tender. This means that they are recognized as a medium of exchange and are backed by the issuing government.Face value: Coins often have a face value, which is the value that is inscribed on the coin and is the value at which the coin is accepted as legal tender. For example, a U.S. gold eagle coin has a face value of $50, even though its actual value is much higher due to its gold content.Mint mark: Coins often have a mint mark, which indicates where the coin was struck.Design: Coins typically have a specific design on one side (the "obverse") and a design on the other side (the "reverse"). These designs may be chosen by the issuing government and may depict historical or cultural figures or symbols.Rounds:Not issued by a government: Gold and silver rounds are not issued by a government and are not recognized as legal tender. They are essentially the same as gold and silver bars, but in the form of a coin.No face value: Rounds do not have a face value and are not accepted as legal tender.No mint mark: Rounds do not have a mint mark because they are not produced by a government mint.Design: Rounds can have a variety of designs, including those that are similar to coins or those that have unique designs.In general, coins are considered to be more widely recognized and accepted than rounds, and they may be easier to sell or trade because of their official status. However, rounds can still be a good option for those who want to invest in precious metals and are not interested in the official status or design of coins.

Photons are particles of light. They are the smallest possible unit of light and are the basic "stuff" that light is made of. Photons are like tiny balls that travel through the air (or through space) and carry light energy with them. When photons hit an object, they can make the object shine, which is how we see things.Imagine a flashlight. The flashlight has a bulb inside it that gives off light. When you turn on the flashlight, the bulb starts to emit photons, which travel through the air and bounce off the walls and other objects in the room. This is what allows you to see what's in front of you.Photons are interesting because they have some strange properties. For example, they can behave like both particles and waves at the same time. They can also travel at the speed of light, which is really fast! Scientists and researchers use photons in lots of different ways, including to make lasers and to study the properties of light and the universe.
