Surprised somebody has n't summed this very simple question up , but i 'll give it a go .. When we hear sounds , what 's happening is our ears are being stimulated by the vibrations in the air , our brain then translates this into an electrical signal inside our brains , this is what we perceive , this electrical signal . This same signal is memorized , and gets associated with other sounds , memories , emotions , ect . So when you experience sound inside your own head , you 're just experiencing that electrical signal , know what i mean ? We experience our thoughts as our own voice because we 've heard our own voice before , we think in our native tongue because language is how we make sense of the world and execute higher logical thought . A deaf person does not hear their own thoughts the way a normal person does because they have never even heard their own voice , and they have never heard words or language .. Imagining what their internal dialog would be is kinda interesting . Anyways , answer to your question : sound is vibrations in air , which stimulates our eardrum , which causes our brain to convert this into an electrical signal that has many associations , other sensations , people , emotions , ect . All senses work like this , photons stimulate your eye , your brain translates that into electrical signal , touch stimulates nerve endings in your body , your body converts that to electrical signals in your brain . Think of this electrical signal as a pathway inside your brain between many neurons , when u first hear the sound , that pathway is created(and the path goes along and is connected to things that sound is associated with , moans with sex , yelling with fighting , ect ) . When you " hear " the sound in your head , you 're just experiencing that pathway being executed again , understand ? In actual fact , we do n't experience reality directly at all , this is n't possible , our brain is basically creating an electrical representation of the stimulation our sensory organs experience . And on top of this , we are living slightly in the past due to the time it takes electrical signals to travel through and between our nerves and neurons .

Tilt-shift photography is a technique that involves taking a photograph and then altering the focus of the image to make certain parts of the photograph appear to be in sharp focus while others are out of focus. This can be done either with special lenses or with software after the photograph has been taken.The effect of tilt-shift photography is to make the photograph look like a miniature model or a toy. This is because the shallow depth of field (the area in the photograph that is in focus) makes certain parts of the photograph stand out, while other parts appear blurry. This creates an illusion of scale, making the photograph appear as if it was taken of a small model rather than a real scene.Tilt-shift photography can be used to make a wide variety of subjects look like miniature models, including buildings, landscapes, and even people. It is a popular technique for creating unique and eye-catching photographs that look quite different from normal photographs.

The concept of a fourth dimension can be difficult to understand, especially if you are just starting to learn about math and physics. But I'll do my best to explain it in a way that is easy to understand. In everyday life, we experience the world around us in three dimensions: length, width, and height. These three dimensions are called the "three spatial dimensions." For example, when you look at a box, you can see how long it is, how wide it is, and how tall it is. These three dimensions are all we need to describe the size and position of objects in the world around us. But in some branches of math and physics, it is useful to imagine the existence of a fourth dimension. This fourth dimension is often called "time." Time is different from the three spatial dimensions because it is not a physical distance that you can measure with a ruler. Instead, it is a measure of how long something takes to happen. For example, if you drop a ball, it will take a certain amount of time for the ball to fall to the ground. So, in a way, the fourth dimension is like a line that stretches out from the present moment into the future. Every moment in time is a point on this line, and as time passes, we move forward along this line. I hope this helps to give you a basic understanding of the fourth dimension. The average, or mean, of a set of values is a way to describe the central tendency of those values. It is found by adding up all of the values in the set and then dividing by the number of values in the set.

For example, let's say you have a set of five numbers: 2, 4, 6, 8, and 10. To find the average of these numbers, you would add them up (2 + 4 + 6 + 8 + 10) and then divide by the number of values in the set (5). This would give you an average, or mean, of 6.

So, when you find the mean of a set of values, you are finding the number that is most typical or most representative of all of the values in the set. It is a way to get a sense of what the "middle" value is, or what value is most common.

Fatty liver is a condition in which there is an accumulation of excess fat in the liver. The treatment for fatty liver depends on the underlying cause of the condition. Some common causes of fatty liver include obesity, high levels of triglycerides in the blood, high alcohol consumption, and rapid weight loss.

There are several medications that may be used to treat fatty liver, including:

Udiliv 300 (ursodeoxycholic acid): This medication helps to dissolve cholesterol in the liver and is often used to treat fatty liver caused by high cholesterol or high levels of triglycerides in the blood.

Rose day 10mg (rosiglitazone): This medication is used to treat type 2 diabetes and may be effective in reducing the amount of fat in the liver.

Febutaz 40 (febuxostat): This medication is used to treat high levels of uric acid in the blood and may be effective in reducing the amount of fat in the liver.

Other medications that may be used to treat fatty liver include statins, which are used to lower cholesterol levels, and vitamin E, which has been shown to be effective in reducing the amount of fat in the liver in some studies.

To be "offset against taxable gains" means to use a loss or expense to reduce the amount of income that is subject to taxation. For example, if you have a taxable gain of $1,000 and an offsetting loss or expense of $500, the loss or expense can be used to reduce the taxable gain to $500. This can help to lower your overall tax liability.In the context of taxes, a taxable gain is the increase in the value of an asset that is subject to taxation when it is sold or otherwise disposed of. An offsetting loss or expense is a loss or expense that can be used to reduce the amount of a taxable gain. This can include things like capital losses, business expenses, or charitable contributions.By using an offsetting loss or expense to reduce a taxable gain, you can potentially lower the amount of taxes you owe. It's important to note that the rules for offsetting losses and expenses against taxable gains can vary depending on the type of asset being sold and the jurisdiction in which you are taxed. It's always a good idea to consult with a tax professional or refer to the tax laws in your area to determine how to best use losses and expenses to offset taxable gains.

Once upon a time there was a river , and next to the river was a village . The river did not flow from north to south nor east to west . Neither did it flow from south to north nor west to east . It just flowed the way it did and the villagers never gave it a moment 's thought . This because all roads in the village lay either parallel to the river or at right angles to it . If a stranger appeared , say , asking directions to the wenchkeep , a villager might respond thusly : " you walk toward the river three blocks , along the river for four blocks , then away from the river for a block . " Then the villager would beam , proudly hooking thumb though a buttonhole in his woolen over - shirt , " there may you procure the finest wenches in all the land . " One day the King came to town . The King brought with him a Sorcerer and the Sorcerer brought with him a device . The device looked to be a pocket watch , but on the face , where the numbered hours should have appeared , were instead inscribed only the names of the four conjectural winds , in clockwise ordered North , East , South , and West . Above these floated a black needle , which by unknown majik did always point to North , irregardless of which however the Sorcerer aimed the thing . Clearly , this was an evil thing , and the villagers began to wonder aloud just what the heck NASA was doing with all those chickens and other tax sundry they had demanded over the years . The King raised a fisted glove , silencing the twittering of the crowd . " My people , " he began . " Henceforth shall ye navigate by this device , for it imposes upon the land a dividing up into north - south and east - west directions . You shall use these directions , and these directions are the ones shall you use . No more of this river direction talk , or whatever the heck it is you backwater yahoos call your primitive system of circumnavigation . " Upon hearing this a great roar came from the crowd . Ramsock the Barrel Maker roared loudest of all . " King , " he roared . " Your system is unnatural and will impose complexities that will kill our jerbs . Presently , should need arise to send barrels to the bagelry , I simply tell my barrel herders to go downstream for a furlong , then away from the river for seven blocks . With your new devilry , downstream will become south - east , away from the river will become south - west and toward the river north - east . Or is it south - south - east or north - south - west ? I know not , for who can reckon such things ? Who here today are capable of these Pythagorean machinations ? " Ramsock motioned to Dipthong the Miller . " You , Dipthong ? " And then to Klaxxon the Barkeep . " You , Klaxxon ? Verily , King , we can barely keep the more dolty amoungst us from coupling with the livestock ! " There followed a chorus of disparagement directed against the King , some of which was spittle - flecked and accompanied by obscene gesturing and demands both unnatural and anatomically improbable . You are attacking our values , Ramsock bellowed over the din , now beating a pitchfork against his breast . You are attacking eigen values ! he shouted , this time using his native tongue , which we 've conveniently assumed is Germanic for illustrative purposes . The King , though dismayed with this rather ham - fisted third act , recognized the need to wrap things up . Thus did he relent and permit the villagers to navigate according to their simple system of eigenvalues for the rest of their days . EDIT : [ source ] ( URL_0 )

People make computer viruses for a variety of reasons, but some common motivations include trying to make money, trying to cause harm or disruption, or trying to gain unauthorized access to systems or information. Some people who make viruses do so for personal gain, such as by creating viruses that display ads or try to steal information that can be sold or used for fraud. Others may create viruses as a form of revenge or to cause chaos. Some hackers also create viruses to gain unauthorized access to computer systems or networks, which they can then use to steal sensitive information or cause damage. Overall, the main goal of people who make viruses is typically to cause some sort of negative impact or to benefit in some way, whether that be financially or through causing disruption or harm.

Fevers are actually a natural and healthy response of the body to fight off infections. When the body is fighting off an infection, it may raise its temperature as a way to kill off the germs that are causing the infection.

However, sometimes a fever can get too high and that can be harmful to the body. A fever is considered too high when it gets above 104 degrees Fahrenheit. When the body gets this hot, it can start to feel uncomfortable and can lead to dehydration. In rare cases, a very high fever can cause seizures or other serious problems.

So, it's important to try to keep the fever at a comfortable level by drinking plenty of fluids and using fever-reducing medications like ibuprofen or acetaminophen. This can help to keep the body from getting too hot and can make you feel more comfortable.

It works like this : Anti - matter is like the opposite end of a magnet , it has the exact opposite charge of an atom . So the protons which are usually + are now - , and the electrons that are normally - are now + . The problem with anti - matter is that it does n't really belong in our universe ( there could be other universes in the multiverse made entirely of anti - matter ) . So , when an anti - matter atom comes into contact with any regular atom , they cancel out in an explosion . Anti - matter is very very expensive to manufacture , and we can only make a few atoms at a time . If we could create a teaspoon of anti - matter , it would bankrupt every country of the world . ( Reply to this if you want me to explain how anti - matter is made ) EDIT : Well for the anti - protons , they have to take atoms and collide them at near - light speeds , and very seldom they get an anti - proton ( which must be handled with great care due to its explosive nature ) . Anti - electrons , or positrons , they are naturally emitted by the sodium-22 ion . They just pair them together and you have anti - matter . EDIT 2 : It has been theorized that anti - matter is actually matter flowing against time ( i.e. going backwards in time ) and that is the reason why the antimatter - matter explosions are so large is because they are cancelling each other out of the time stream . Dark matter on the other hand is matter that does not have any physical form , but we know it exists because we have detected gravity where it is . Gravity is much like a tarp . If you put a heavy object on it ( like a sun ) it will bend , and other objects on the tarp will circle it ( planets ) because it creates such a dip . But with that , you can see that the sun is causing the entire tarp to dip . With dark matter , it appears as if the tarp is dipping by some invisible force . There are several theories about this , but the most predominant one is that dark matter is actually matter from other universes in the multiverse that are in different dimensions . More to the point , gravity has an easier time bleeding through dimensions ( imagine the dimensions as pieces of paper on top of each other ) , and that 's why a great deal of our universe is filled with dark matter . Hope that helps .

Temperature is VERY roughly a measurement of how fast particles are moving . So the molecules in the ice are moving slower than the particles in the liquid water . When the faster moving liquid particles collide with the slower moving ice particles , the liquid particles slow down due to a transfer of energy and therefore their temperature drops . The ice particles speed up because of this collision . The temperatures of the two substances will continue to change until they are at the same temperature . Imagine walking through a crowded hallway . You are walking fast and run into someone in front of you who is walking slow . Upon colliding with them , they will speed up and you will slow down . You will continue to collide until you are both traveling at the same speed .

Allergies occur when your body's immune system mistakenly thinks that a substance that is normally harmless, such as pollen or certain foods, is harmful. In response, your immune system produces antibodies to fight off the supposed threat. These antibodies cause certain cells in your body to release chemicals, such as histamine, which can lead to allergy symptoms. It's not exactly clear why some people develop allergies and others do not, but it is thought to be a combination of genetic and environmental factors.As for a cure, there is no one-size-fits-all cure for allergies. However, there are several ways to manage and treat allergies, including avoiding triggers, taking over-the-counter or prescription medications, and getting allergy shots (immunotherapy). The treatment that works best for you will depend on your specific allergies and the severity of your symptoms.

Artificial nuclear transmutation is a process that involves changing the nucleus of an atom from one element to another through nuclear reactions. This process could potentially be used to reduce the hazard of radioactive waste by converting the radioisotopes present in the waste into stable, non-radioactive elements. In terms of science, it is possible to achieve artificial nuclear transmutation through various methods, such as using particle accelerators or nuclear reactors to bombard the atoms with high-energy particles. However, this process is currently not practical or economically viable on a large scale due to the high cost and technical challenges involved. To explain this concept to a five-year-old: Imagine you have a box full of toys that are broken or no longer wanted. Instead of throwing them away, you could try to fix them or give them to someone else who might want them. In the same way, scientists are trying to find ways to "fix" the broken atoms in radioactive waste so that they are no longer dangerous and can be safely disposed of or reused. However, this is a very difficult and expensive process, so it's not something that is done very often.

There are many ways that experts can tell if a photo has been doctored. One way is by looking at the pixels in the photo. When a photo is edited, it can often leave behind traces such as pixels that are a different color or in a different pattern than the surrounding pixels. Experts can use special software to analyze the pixels in a photo and look for signs of editing. Another way experts can tell if a photo has been doctored is by looking for inconsistencies in the photo. For example, if the shadows in the photo don't match up with the way the light is hitting the objects in the photo, it could be a sign that the photo has been doctored. Experts can also use their knowledge of physics and the way that light works to help identify when a photo has been doctored.

Depression is a mental health condition that can cause a person to feel very sad, hopeless, and unmotivated. It is more than just feeling sad or down for a little while. Depression can last for weeks, months, or even years, and can make it hard for a person to do their everyday activities.

Sometimes, people with depression may also have physical symptoms, like trouble sleeping or eating, or feeling tired all the time. Depression can be caused by many things, like a difficult life event, chemical changes in the brain, or a family history of depression.

Suicide is when a person intentionally takes their own life. It is a very serious and tragic event, and it is often a result of a person feeling overwhelmed and unable to cope with their emotions and circumstances. People who are considering suicide may feel hopeless, helpless, or like they are a burden to others. They may also be struggling with a mental health condition, like depression, or may be going through a tough time in their life.

It is important to remember that people who are considering suicide need help and support. If you or someone you know is feeling suicidal, it is important to get help right away. You can talk to a trusted adult, a mental health professional, or call a suicide prevention hotline. There is hope and help available.

Snow can make the world feel quieter because it absorbs sound waves. When sound waves hit a solid object, they can either be reflected, absorbed, or transmitted through the object. Snow is a soft, fluffy material that is able to absorb sound waves, rather than reflecting them like a hard surface would. This means that the sound waves are absorbed by the snow, rather than bouncing off of it and traveling through the air. As a result, there is less noise in the air, and the world may seem quieter.

Cap and trade is a system intended to reduce the production of carbon dioxide , the greenhouse gas that is most responsible for global warming . In theory , it is simple . Everyone gets a limit on how much carbon they are allowed to produce . If you use less than your limit , you can sell your share to someone else . It makes it more expensive to produce lots of carbon , and cheaper to use less . The problem is that in practice cap and trade is far more complex . The government needs to create a way of measuring how much carbon each person produces , keeping track of how much they 've used , regulating a marketplace for buying and selling , and regulators to enforce the rules of the market . A recently failed cap and trade bill was over 1700 pages long . It is a very complex system to set up . For reference , the US constitution , when printed as a small paperback , is around 80 pages long . That recently failed cap and trade bill was over 20 times longer than the constitution . Cap and trade is never going to work . Neither major party supports cap and trade . Democrats do n't like the trade part , Republicans do n't like the cap part . Running the program requires a lot of bureaucracy , making the government bigger . Conservatives really do n't like that sort of thing . The system is so complicated that it will be impossible to run cap and trade without loopholes undermining the system . There is a far better system , Carbon Fee and Dividend . This program adds a slowly increasing fee to fossil fuels . This fee is placed on carbon sources when they enter the economy . It 's charged to the company running the oilfields , the coal mines , or the incoming tanker ship from overseas . This will increase the price of carbon fuels . Gas will be slightly more expensive . But , the government does n't keep the fee . They pay the fee back to the people . This is a market based solution . It makes fossil fuels more expensive , making it more profitable for companies to switch to renewables . The fee increases in a predictable manner , so businesses can plan for the future . It does n't require increasing the size of the government . The program can be run through agencies we already have . Most Americans will get more money back from the dividend than they pay in increased prices . So they will continue to support it , and it 's unlikely to be eliminated when the next administration gets into office . Carbon Fee and Dividend is a far better system than Cap and Trade , and will be a good long - term solution for reducing global warming .

It is unlikely that we will be able to create giant robots like the ones in Pacific Rim or Gundam with the technology we have today. These robots are fictional and do not exist in the real world. They are creations of science fiction and are not based on actual science or technology.

So while it is possible that we may see the development of advanced robotics and engineering technologies in the future, it is unlikely that we will see giant robots like the ones in Pacific Rim or Gundam in the near future.

In the United States, taxes are collected by the federal government to pay for various public goods and services, such as national defense, infrastructure, and social welfare programs. When you earn income, such as from a job or business, the government requires you to pay a percentage of that income in taxes. The amount of tax that you owe is determined by your income level and other factors, such as whether you are married and how many dependents you have.

When you file your tax return, you calculate how much tax you owe based on your income and any deductions or credits that you are eligible for. If you have already paid more tax than you owe, you will get a refund. If you have not paid enough tax, you will owe additional taxes and may have to pay a penalty.

Sometimes people owe taxes because they have not had enough tax withheld from their paychecks during the year. For example, if you have multiple jobs or your income changes during the year, you may not have had enough tax withheld from your pay to cover the amount you owe. In this case, you may owe taxes when you file your return.

The tax refund that you receive is the excess amount of tax that you paid throughout the year, above and beyond what you actually owed. For example, if you paid $1,000 in taxes but you only owed $800, you would get a refund of $200. The government holds onto this excess tax throughout the year and then returns it to you when you file your tax return.

Cigarettes are typically sold in packs, and the price of a pack is based on the total number of cigarettes it contains, not the length of the individual cigarettes. So whether a pack contains regular length cigarettes or longer 100s, the price is the same because the pack contains the same total number of cigarettes. For example, if a pack of regular length cigarettes contains 20 cigarettes and costs $5, and a pack of 100s contains 20 cigarettes and also costs $5, then the price of each individual cigarette is the same, regardless of its length. This is because the total cost of the pack is divided equally among all the cigarettes it contains.

I once had a nutty art teacher equate it to an early feminist piece . Her justification is as follows : All the portraits at the time were in the most lavish settings in the owners estate , dripping with every piece if jewelry the person owned to demonstrate wealth and power . In portraits , especially those featuring only women , they wore pieces that flaunted their husband 's wealth and affluence . Women were not individuals back then , but part of their husband 's amassed wealth and influence . The Mona Lisa is the antitheses of that trend . It is simply a picture of an independent woman belonging to no man , chained by no title or particular wealth , confined to no palace , and displaying what can be construed as independent thought ( the smirk and intriguing gaze ) . This was absolutely radical given the era . Not sure how common that interpretation is , but it always stuck with me .

Hate speech is constitutional , barring certain very limited restrictions . The basic principle coming out of R.A.V. v. St. Paul ( 1992 ) is that the government can not prohibit speech based on the * content * of the message . For example , trying to ban Neo - Nazis from holding demonstrations would boil down to the government banning them because they disapprove of what they are saying . Now , it 's perfect correct for citizens to disapprove of Neo - Nazism , but it 's not for the government to bring the force of law down upon them because , if we do , we have now entered the slippery slope of deciding what people can say based on the majority . We ban Neo - Nazi speech because we do n't like it . What happens if the majority does n't like Pro - gay rights speech ? Or pro - evolutionary theory speech ? We allow hate speech because it 's not the job of the government to tell us what we are and are n't allowed to say . It 's up to the citizens to individually decide what 's appropriate . > Speech is powerful . It can stir people to action , move them to tears of both joy and sorrow , and — as it did here — inflict great pain . On the facts before us , we can not react to that pain by punishing the speaker . As a Nation we have chosen a different course — to protect even hurtful speech on public issues to ensure that we do not stifle public debate . > Snyder v. Phelps ( 2011 )

AM and FM are separate methods of encoding and broadcasting radio signals . M works by modulating the amplitude of the signal according to the information being sent , while the frequency remains constant . This differs from FM technology in which sound is encoded by varying the frequency of the wave and the amplitude is kept constant . . This difference in signal type is what causes the sounds to change . AM has poorer sound quality compared with FM , but is cheaper and includes lower bandwidth making it ideal for having many stations in a small broadcast range . FM has a sharper quality at the cost of higher bandwidth , but can be blocked by physical hindrances ( mountains or your wall ) making it much shorter range .

The Tea Party is a political movement that emerged in the United States in 2009. It is a conservative movement that advocates for smaller government, lower taxes, and a return to traditional values. The name "Tea Party" is a reference to the Boston Tea Party of 1773, in which colonists protesting British taxation threw a shipment of tea into Boston Harbor. The Tea Party has been influential in shaping the direction of the Republican Party and has played a significant role in American politics over the past decade. It has been associated with the promotion of various conservative causes, such as opposition to the Affordable Care Act and support for gun rights.

General Grievous is a character in the Star Wars franchise. He is a cyborg general of the Confederacy of Independent Systems and the military leader of the Separatist droid army during the Clone Wars.

Grievous was once a Kaleesh warlord named Qymaen jai Sheelal, but after suffering severe injuries in battle, he was reconstructed as a cyborg by the Geonosians. As a result, he gained immense strength and mechanical abilities, and became a formidable opponent in combat.

In the Clone Wars television series, Grievous is shown to be a skilled tactician and a ruthless warrior, leading the Separatist forces against the Galactic Republic. He is known for his hatred of the Jedi and his collection of lightsaber trophies from defeated Jedi Knights. Grievous eventually meets his demise at the hands of Obi-Wan Kenobi on the planet Utapau.

The order of operations is the set of rules that tells us the correct order in which to solve different parts of a math problem. It helps us to make sure that we get the right answer when we solve a problem.

Here's an example of how the order of operations works:

Say we have the problem: 4 + 3 x 2

The first rule of the order of operations is to solve any operations inside parentheses first. Since there are no parentheses in this problem, we move on to the next rule.

The second rule is to solve any exponents (like squaring or cubing a number). Since there are no exponents in this problem, we move on to the next rule.

The third rule is to solve any multiplications or divisions (whichever comes first in the problem). In this case, we have 3 x 2, so we solve the multiplication first and get 6.

The fourth and final rule is to solve any additions or subtractions (whichever comes first in the problem). In this case, we have 4 + 6, so we solve the addition and get the final answer of 10.

So the order of operations helps us to make sure that we solve the problem in the correct order and get the right answer.

There are a few reasons why some people might still believe that vaccines cause autism, despite the fact that this idea has been thoroughly debunked. One reason is that it can be difficult for people to accept that a medical treatment or procedure could have serious side effects. It's natural for people to want to believe that anything that is meant to help us must be completely safe. Another reason is that some people might not have access to accurate information about vaccines, and might believe misinformation that they hear from friends, family, or online sources. It's also important to remember that science is a process of constantly learning and testing new ideas. While the overwhelming scientific evidence shows that vaccines are safe and effective, it's possible that scientists may continue to study this topic and learn more about how vaccines work and any potential side effects they might have. Overall, it's important to make decisions about your health based on reliable, scientific information. If you have questions about vaccines, it's a good idea to talk to a healthcare provider or someone else who is well-informed about this topic.

Memoirs are important because they allow people to share their personal experiences and memories with others. Since OP [ wants to understand hash functions in general , not SHA2 ] ( URL_0 ): * Take a sentence * Replace each letter with the next one in the alphabet - Hello World turns into Gdkkn Vnqkc See , gibberish is easy ( this is a very early and obviously very insecure form of encryption ) . Now , this can be decrypted quite easily , and it has the same length as what you put in . A hash is defined as a mathematical function that takes stuff of arbitrary length and turns it into output with a fixed length . Let 's build one . * Take the number 123 * Now take the letters of your text , and assign numbers to them ( just like a computer naturally does ) , lets go with the simple A=1 , B=2 , ... scheme , with 27 for space . This translates " Hello " to 8 5 12 12 15 . Now multiply the numer you currently have ( 123 ) with the first letter 's number . If the result is longer than 3 digits , only remember the last three . Repeat for the other letters : * 123 * 8 = 984 * 984 * 12 = ~~11~~808 * 808 * 12 = ~~9~~696 * 696 * 15 = ~~10~~440 Congratulations , you turned " Hello " into 440 . This is a horrible scheme ( for starters , it reacts really really badly to the letter J ) , but it should explain the principle . A real hash function that is often used is DJBX33A : Start with 5381 , take the current number , multiply it by 33 , and add the number of the letter . However , that is not a * cryptographic * hash like SHA2 . For that , the art is to make sure certain additional properties are met , e.g. an attacker can not find two sentences that result in the same number . This is the art of modern cryptography , and learning that is really advanced and crazy maths that makes mathematicians cry and run away . If you want to learn that , [ this ] ( URL_1 ) provides a good start . And just to be sure , especially if someone else stumbles across it and gets dumb ideas : * * DO NOT EVER ATTEMPT TO ACTUALLY USE A HASH FUNCTION YOU BUILT YOURSELF FOR ANYTHING PRACTICAL . DON'T EVEN THINK ABOUT IT . * * You * * will * * fail to make it secure .

You could use prime numbers to create a special code for your message. First, you would pick two very large prime numbers and multiply them together to get a third number. This third number would be the "key" to your code. You would then use the key to "encrypt" your message by changing the letters in the message into numbers using a special formula, and then perform some mathematical operations on the numbers using the key. Your friend would have a copy of the key and would be able to use it to "decrypt" the message by reversing the process. A plus-minus sign, also known as a plus-or-minus symbol, is a mathematical symbol that indicates that a value or expression may be positive or negative. It is typically used to indicate a range of possible values for a quantity, such as in measurements or estimates.

For example, if a measurement is given as "5 +/- 2," it means that the actual value of the quantity could be anywhere between 3 and 7, since 5 plus or minus 2 is equal to 3 or 7. This is often used to indicate the level of uncertainty or error in a measurement.

The plus-minus sign is also used in algebra to indicate that a quantity can take on both positive and negative values. For example, in the equation "x +/- y = z," x and y could be either positive or negative numbers, and the equation would still hold true.

Overall, the plus-minus sign is a useful tool for indicating the range of possible values for a quantity or expression, and is used in many different fields, including science, mathematics, and engineering.

A bore is the diameter of the hole inside a cylinder in a car engine. The cylinder is a hollow tube-like part of the engine where a piston moves up and down. The bore size is important because it determines the size of the engine and how much fuel and air it can burn.

A valve is a part that controls the flow of air and fuel into and out of the cylinder. There are usually two types of valves in a car engine: intake valves and exhaust valves. The intake valves allow air and fuel to enter the cylinder, and the exhaust valves allow the burned gases to exit the cylinder. The valves are opened and closed by a camshaft, which is a shaft with a series of bumps on it that push on the valves to open and close them.

So to summarize, a bore is the diameter of the cylinder, and a valve is a part that controls the flow of air and fuel into and out of the cylinder.

When you drive a manual gearbox , YOU put energy into depressing the clutch , and moving the gear selector . In an automatic , the GEARBOX takes energy from the car to shift gears . More bits in the gear box = More energy = More gas used per mile . Edit : I did n't see your other questions : A person 's shifting might make a difference for better or worse i.e. it 's possible to shift ' better ' than the automatic or worse than it , but the effect is mostly due to the above . You can ' design around ' the problem by making the automatic more efficient , but only to a degree . Modern , high end automatics do very well in comparison to manuals . Also , many high end cars are ' Semi - Automatic ' where it acts like an auto but allows manual control , these will perform as an auto in regards to gas because of the machinery . EDIT 2 : Seeing as we have a bunch of pedants here , from wiki : > Fuel economy The manual transmission couples the engine to the transmission with a rigid clutch instead of the torque converter on an automatic transmission or the v - belt of a continuously variable transmission,[6 ] which slip by nature . Manual transmissions also lack the parasitic power consumption of the automatic transmission 's hydraulic pump . Because of this , manual transmissions generally offer better fuel economy than automatic or continuously variable transmissions ; however the disparity has been somewhat offset with the introduction of locking torque converters on automatic transmissions.[7 ] Increased fuel economy with a properly operated manual transmission vehicle versus an equivalent automatic transmission vehicle can range from 5 % to about 15 % depending on driving conditions and style of driving.[8 ] The lack of control over downshifting under load in an automatic transmission , coupled with a typical vehicle engine 's greater efficiency under higher load , can enable additional fuel gains from a manual transmission by allowing the operator to keep the engine performing under a more efficient load / RPM combination . Also , manual transmissions do not require active cooling and because they are , mechanically , much simpler than automatic transmissions , they generally weigh less than comparable automatics , which can improve economy in stop - and - go traffic.[7 ] I stand by my statement of : More bits in the gear box = More energy = More gas used per mile .

The Berlin Wall was a barrier that was built by the government of East Germany to separate the eastern part of Berlin (which was controlled by the Soviet Union) from the western part of Berlin (which was controlled by the United States, Great Britain, and France). It was constructed in the late 1950s, and it was meant to prevent people who lived in East Berlin from fleeing to the West.

The Berlin Wall was a very big deal because it symbolized the divide between the Western countries (which were democratic and capitalist) and the Eastern countries (which were communist). The Berlin Wall was also a symbol of the Cold War, which was a time when the United States and the Soviet Union were in a state of tension and competition, but not actually fighting each other.

The Berlin Wall came down in 1989, which was a very important event in history. It happened because the people of East Germany and other Eastern European countries started protesting and demanding more freedom and democracy. The government of East Germany eventually agreed to open the wall, and people from East and West Berlin were able to reunite with their families and friends. This was a big deal because it marked the end of the Cold War and the start of a new era of cooperation between the United States and the Soviet Union.

The degrees of murder are categories that are used to describe the severity of a murder charge.

First degree murder is the most serious type of murder. It is typically premeditated, meaning that the person accused of the crime planned and intended to kill the victim beforehand. First degree murder is often punishable by life in prison or the death penalty.

Second degree murder is also a serious charge, but it is not premeditated like first degree murder. It may involve reckless or negligent behavior that leads to someone's death, such as driving while intoxicated and causing a fatal accident. Second degree murder is usually punishable by a prison sentence of 15 years to life.

Third degree murder is the least serious type of murder charge. It typically involves a death that occurs as a result of reckless or criminal negligence, but not necessarily an intent to kill. Third degree murder is usually punishable by a prison sentence of up to 25 years.

It's important to note that the specific definitions of these degrees of murder may vary depending on the state or country in which the crime was committed.

The keyboard layout that most people use today is called the QWERTY layout, and it was designed in the 1870s by Christopher Sholes, the inventor of the first practical typewriter. The layout was designed to slow down typing speed in order to reduce the risk of the keys getting jammed together. 
Today, keyboards are still designed with the QWERTY layout because it has become the standard and most people are familiar with it. However, there have been other keyboard layouts developed over the years that aim to improve typing speed and efficiency. One example is the Dvorak layout, which was designed in the 1930s and is believed by some to be easier to type on than the QWERTY layout. 
As for whether our behavior in typing and the use of words has changed enough to warrant a change in the keyboard layout, it is difficult to say. While there have been technological advances and changes in the way we communicate, the QWERTY layout has remained popular and is still widely used.

> Is it something about the air contact with the product ? Pretty much . The product is bottled in a controlled environment where they know there wo n't be any contaminants that would cause the product to go bad . It 's then sealed to be air tight . Since it 's airtight , no contaminants can get in and it 'll stay good for a reasonably long time . At least enough to get it shipped to the store and let it sit on the shelf for a while . Once you open it , you 've broken the controlled environment and moisture , bacteria , fungus and whatever else could make the product go bad can get in . Refrigeration keeps these from ruining your food for a while longer . > What about juices ? Same deal . They can only go bad if there 's something in the bottle to make it go bad . They 're bottled and sealed in a controlled environment where nothing bad can get in . > Will it be okay to eat / drink even if its not cold ? Assuming you mean opening it for the first time , breaking the seal , and eating it warm right away ( like grabbing a bottle of mayo for a picnic and heading straight from the grocery store to the picnic ) , it should be fine . Once you break the seal , the clock starts ticking on how long the product will stay good because it 's now been exposed to an uncontrolled environment - bacteria / moisture / fungus has gotten in . In a warm environment , this can make the product go bad quickly ( probably on the order of a day or two ) . Keeping it in the fridge extends this amount of time before things go bad because it kills or slows down the effects of bacteria / moisture / fungus .

The Facebook experiment you're referring to is a study that was conducted by Facebook in 2014. In this study, Facebook researchers manipulated the news feed of about 600,000 Facebook users to see how their emotions would be affected. The researchers wanted to find out if seeing more positive or more negative content on Facebook would affect the emotional state of the users. To do this, they changed the news feed of some users to show more positive content, while they changed the news feed of other users to show more negative content. The researchers then looked at how the users' emotions changed based on the content they saw on their news feed. They found that seeing more positive content made people feel happier, while seeing more negative content made people feel sadder. This experiment has been controversial because some people believe that it was unethical for Facebook to manipulate the news feed of its users without their consent. Some people also believe that the experiment could have had unintended consequences, such as making people feel worse about themselves or their lives. Overall, this experiment was conducted to try to understand how social media can affect our emotions and behavior. It's important to remember that this was just one study, and more research is needed to fully understand the effects of social media on our emotions and behavior.

A "Golden Cross" is a technical analysis pattern that occurs when a shorter-term moving average crosses above a longer-term moving average. This is often taken as a bullish signal, indicating that the trend of the stock is shifting from bearish to bullish.The most common moving averages used in a Golden Cross analysis are the 50-day and 200-day moving averages. These are considered to be long-term and intermediate-term averages, respectively, and a Golden Cross formed by these averages is seen as a strong bullish signal.Other moving averages that are sometimes used in a Golden Cross analysis include the 20-day and 50-day moving averages, or the 100-day and 200-day moving averages. The specific moving averages used can depend on the time frame being analyzed and the preferences of the analyst.It's important to note that the Golden Cross pattern is just one tool that can be used to evaluate a stock, and it's not necessarily a guarantee of future performance. It's always a good idea to use a variety of tools and techniques when analyzing a stock, and to consider other factors such as fundamental analysis and market conditions.

When a computer is turned off, it is simply in a state where it is not using any power and all its functions are not running. When you want to turn the computer back on, you press a button on the computer or keyboard, which sends a signal to the computer's power supply to start providing power to the system again. The power supply then sends power to the other components of the computer, such as the processor and memory, which start running the system again and boot up the operating system.

So, even though the computer is turned off, the power supply is still receiving power from the wall outlet or battery and is ready to provide power to the rest of the system when needed. When you press the power button, the power supply starts providing power to the system and the computer turns on.

A " blood thinner " does n't necessarily thin out your blood . Medically , they 're called " anticoagulants " , which means they reduce the ability of blood cells to stick together and form clots . If you have a clot in a vein , like having a rock stuck in a hose , the pressure increases as the flow is reduced due to the blockage . When a " blood thinner " helps break down that clot , and blood can flow freely , pressure is reduced . Some also have the effect of dilating veins and arteries , making them physically larger . A bigger pipe with the same flow is going to have less pressure in it .

Atoms are the building blocks of matter, and they are extremely small. When you cut something, you are using a blade to physically separate the material into two or more pieces. The blade does not "smash" the atoms or split them down the middle. Instead, it creates a new surface by moving the atoms around and creating a clean break. When you cut food, the blade of the knife pushes through the food and separates the atoms and molecules that make up the food. The atoms and molecules themselves are not damaged or destroyed in the process. The same is true when you cut paper or any other material. The blade simply rearranges the atoms and molecules to create a new surface. So, to summarize, cutting does not involve smashing or splitting atoms. It simply involves rearranging them to create a new surface.

To answer your first question ( how do you make this effect ) 1 . Get a picture of a large event where you can see for a long distance within the frame of the picture . See how in the picture you posted you can see many cars close up and also many cars far away ? That 's a good picture to start with ! 2 . Without going into too much technical detail , using a photo editor program you blur just the top and bottom of the picture using a gradient . This means that the top and bottom of the picture will be most blurry and as you get to the center the picture gets less blurry . Congratulations , you just made a tilt - shift picture ! Now , why does it make things look miniature ? Well , this has to do with how your eyes look at small objects . Let 's do a little experiment . Get three little toys and put them on your desk , so that one toy is in front , one toy is in back about 6 inches away , and the last toy is even further back , about another 6 inches away . Now get down towards desk level and close one eye and focus the other eye on the middle toy . You should notice that when you 're focusing on the middle toy the toy in front and the toy in back are blurry . This is because the way your eyes and most camera lenses work , when you 're looking at things relatively close to you ( less than about 1 - 3 feet away ) , the lens in your eye that helps you focus can only focus on a narrow strip at the distance you are focusing . So when you are focusing on the middle toy , only the things that are that toy 's distance away from your eye will be in focus , and everything else in front of and behind the toy will be blurry . This is called * * narrow depth of field * * , meaning that when you are focusing on something close to you , you can only focus on a * * narrow * * strip at the certain * * depth * * ( aka distance from your eye ) of the object you 're looking at in your * * field * * of view . So how does this tie into tilt - shift pictures ? Well basically all these pictures are just mimicking what your eye does when it is looking at small objects close up . The cars closest to the camera ( the ones at the bottom of the picture ) , and the cars farthest from the camera ( the ones at the top of the picture ) , are made blurry because they are in front of or behind the depth at which the camera is " focusing " ( remember in real life that the camera took a picture of real , life - sized objects from very far away so it was basically able to focus on everything all at once ) . But , once you treat the picture with the blurring effects , then your brain perceives the picture as if it was taken by a camera up close to toy - sized objects ! I hope that explanation helped !

Black light, also known as ultraviolet light or UV light, is a type of light that is not visible to the human eye because it has a shorter wavelength than the light that we can see. It is called "black" light because it is not visible to us, not because it is actually the color black.

To artificially produce black light, we can use a special type of light bulb or lamp that is designed to emit ultraviolet light. These bulbs or lamps often use a chemical called phosphor to produce the UV light. When the phosphor is energized, it gives off UV light.

Black light is often used in scientific and medical research, as well as in entertainment and lighting effects. It can also be used to detect certain types of substances, such as pet stains or certain types of bacteria, because it causes certain materials to fluoresce or glow in the dark.

There are a few different types of taxes that may be relevant to your investments, depending on the type of investment and your tax situation. Here are some common types of taxes that you may encounter when investing:Capital gains tax: If you sell an investment for more than you paid for it, the difference is considered a capital gain and may be subject to capital gains tax. Capital gains tax rates depend on how long you held the investment and your overall income tax bracket.Dividend tax: If you receive dividends from stocks or mutual funds, these dividends may be subject to tax. The tax rate on dividends depends on your income tax bracket.Interest income tax: Interest income from savings accounts and other investments is generally subject to income tax.Sales tax: Some types of investments, such as real estate, may be subject to sales tax when they are sold.It's important to note that the tax treatment of investments can be complex, and you should consult with a tax professional or refer to IRS guidelines for more information on the specific tax implications of your investments.

Former ESL / EFL teacher and Bilingual speaker of English and Thai here . As a translation program it is not bad at all . It is actually quite good . As for being an ESL / EFL Teacher it is miserable because the students DO NOT KNOW HOW TO : 1 . USE IT CORRECTLY 2 . USE IT SO I DON'T KNOW THEY USED IT Here is how you can use it correctly , and use it so it makes as much sense as possible : When I am translating a document from Thai to English ( my native language ) I throw the document into the translator and see what comes out . As you can probably guess IT IS incorrect English , but by reading it you can most likely get the gist of what has been written . Sometimes it is pretty spot on and you are only left changing a few words here and there . It is pretty easy and I get people to pay me quite a bit of money to do translations like this ( they do n't know this is my step one ) . If there are a lot of things I do n't understand I go to step two Second Step , read the Thai and start translating . When I get to a part / word I do n't understand I then just look at the English translation and see what it has translated it to and I can then come up with the correct word to use . Now , what if you do n't speak a second language and you are trying to figure out a word for your take home Spanish quiz . Google Translate is quite good when it comes to translating single words , but the key is that you have to check to see what all the options are that are given to you for words that translate to what you are looking for . Why ? , Well thank you for asking . Language is a fantastic tool , but due to cultural differences when translating there is NO word that can be used to translate the meaning of another word 100 % , period . Yes some may come to about 99.9 % but all the cultural context that comes with a language can not be translated directly by one word . SOOOOOO , look at all your options , then back translate those options ( Often times on other websites ) and you can come up with the best option for what you are looking for . TL;DR : Google Translate is quite , good but you have to know how to use it correctly to make sure you are getting the right translation . It just comes off as bad when you copy and paste a whole essay into it and then hand it into your foreign language teacher ..... trust me we know and we are n't idiots ( try translating a foreign language book / essay / paper into English and see how it comes out . yes that is what it looks like to us )

The ability to have multiple orgasms is not limited to one specific gender. Both men and women can potentially have multiple orgasms, although it may be more common for women to experience multiple orgasms.

Orgasms are caused by the release of certain chemicals in the brain and the contractions of certain muscles. These chemicals and muscle contractions can cause a person to feel pleasure and release tension.

After an orgasm, the body needs time to recover and replenish these chemicals before another orgasm is possible. This recovery period is known as the refractory period. The refractory period can vary in length from person to person and can be shorter or longer depending on a variety of factors, such as age, physical and emotional health, and previous sexual activity.

So, while it is not necessarily true that men can only have one orgasm in a sitting while women can have multiple orgasms, it is possible that some men may have a longer refractory period than some women, which could make it more difficult for them to have multiple orgasms in a short period of time. However, this is not a hard and fast rule and can vary greatly from person to person.

Transparency is the property of a material that allows light to pass through it. When light hits an object, it can either be absorbed by the object, reflected off the object, or transmitted through the object. Transparent materials allow most of the light to pass through them, so they appear clear. Translucent materials allow some light to pass through them, but they also scatter the light, so they appear cloudy or hazy.

The reason that some hard materials like diamonds and bulletproof glass can be transparent is because they are made up of tiny crystals or molecules that are arranged in such a way that allows light to pass through them. Soft materials like playdough or paint are not transparent because they are made up of larger molecules that are not arranged in a way that allows light to pass through easily. Instead, the light is absorbed or scattered by the material, making it appear opaque.

So, the main difference between transparent and opaque materials is the way that their molecules are arranged and the size of their molecules. Transparent materials have small molecules that are arranged in a way that allows light to pass through, while opaque materials have larger molecules that absorb or scatter the light.

No , it goes like this : 1 . Homo erectus . A few H. erectus leave Africa ( able to survive only in the tropics of Eurasia , lacked fire ) ; some of these Eurasian H. erectus groups evolve into new hominid species . 2 . Meanwhile , back in Africa ! Homo erectus has evolved into several new hominid species , most notably Homo heidelbergensis . A few H. heidelbergensis leave Africa ; Eurasian H. heidelbergensis began to evolve into a new species , but that proto - species got divided across opposite ends of Eurasia so it ended up becoming two species : Homo neanderthalensis ( Europe and Middle East ) and Homo denisova ( SE Asia , although the only surviving remains are in Siberia ) . At around this time the Homo erectus in Eurasia begin to disappear , possibly due to the Heidelberg / Neanderthal / Denisova clan . 3 . Meanwhile , back in Africa ! Homo heidelbergensis has evolved into several new hominid species , most notably Homo sapiens . Some H. sapiens branches head down to SE Africa , and next to Central Africa . At this point a few Homo sapiens leave Africa for Eurasia . One branch begins heading out along the tropical coastline immediately ; when this branch gets to SE Asia , there is some denisova / sapiens banging . Another branch later north through the Caucasus , where there is some neanderthalensis / sapiens banging , and then breaks up , heading west into Europe and east into East Asia . 4 . Meanwhile , back in Africa : no new species ! We do have some hominid / hominid banging , possibly with two different species , but we do n't really know the details because fossils do n't survive in tropical climates , so we do n't have any DNA from those species . Both the main trunk of the human family tree and the Neanderthals ( plus Denisovans ) evolved from * Homo heidelbergensis . * Subsequently happenstance brought these cousins back together , and they were sufficiently closely related to have children . So a very large fraction of the world population is descended from two or three branches of this family tree ; they 're not * evolved from * Neanderthals , they * are * ( part ) Neanderthal , even though the majority of their genes come from the Homo sapiens branch .

Money laundering is the process of disguising the proceeds of a crime as legitimate funds. Criminals often engage in money laundering to make it harder for law enforcement to trace the money back to its illegal source. Here's an example of how money laundering works:

Imagine that a thief steals $100,000 from a bank. The thief can't just deposit the money into their own bank account because the bank would report the large deposit to the authorities. Instead, the thief might try to launder the money by using it to buy something valuable, like a car or a piece of jewelry. The thief then sells the car or jewelry to someone else for cash.

Now the thief has clean money that can be deposited into a bank account without attracting attention. However, the thief still needs to explain where the money came from. To do this, they might create a fake business and claim that the money is the profits from the business.

This is just one example, but there are many other ways that money launderers can try to conceal the illegal source of their funds. Money laundering can be a complex and sophisticated process, but the basic idea is to make it difficult for authorities to trace the money back to its illegal source.

Calculus is about approximating curvy things with straight things . It 's hard to find the area of a weird blob , but it 's easy to find the area of a square , so we try to measure blobs by seeing how many squares we can put inside of them . It 's hard to know the direction of a curvy line at any one point , but it 's easy to know the direction a straight line is pointing , so we try to understand weird curves by breaking them up into little tiny straight lines .

Investing in NASA and space exploration can bring economic benefits to the United States in a number of ways. One way is through the creation of jobs. NASA and the space industry employ a lot of people, from engineers and scientists to technicians and support staff. These jobs not only provide employment for individuals, but they also contribute to the economy through the money that employees earn and spend in their communities. Another way that space exploration can benefit the economy is through the development of new technologies and innovations. Many technologies that we use in our everyday lives, such as satellite communications, GPS, and weather forecasting, were developed for use in space and have been adapted for use on Earth. These technologies have created entire industries and have helped to drive economic growth. Finally, space exploration can also have indirect economic benefits by inspiring and motivating people, especially young people, to pursue careers in science, technology, engineering, and math (STEM). This can lead to a stronger and more competitive workforce in the long term, which can help to drive economic growth and competitiveness. Overall, while space exploration may not directly bring in a lot of money, it can have significant economic benefits through the creation of jobs, the development of new technologies, and the inspiration it provides to pursue careers in STEM fields.

When someone gather data , one could start with a list : 1 ) item a 2 ) item b 3 ) item c but what if the items on the list each has it 's own set of information ? 1 ) item a -name : Math Book -author : Sue -cover : green 2 ) item b -name : History Book -author : Bob -cover : red 3 ) item c -name : Dictionary -author : Lucy -cover : Blue They could be laid out in a spreadsheet like in Excel ! name author cover item a Math Book Sue green item b History Book Bob red item c Dictionary Lucy blue The interesting thing about the Author column is that authors has their own set of information : 1 ) author -full name -occupation -phone number which could be used for their own spreadsheet : Full name Occupation Phone Number Sue Mary Sue Teacher 555 - 52 - 5552 Bob John Robert Teacher 555 - 53 - 5553 Lucy Lucy Lace Linguist 555 - 54 - 5554 But wait , now there 's two sheets in the excel file , or worse , two excel files . They 're separate so they might be copied separately . I might forgot to put in an author into the author file when I update the books sheet with a book with a new author . Or I have the Math Book and wanted to call the author for clarification , but all I have is the books file . What if I have several hundred books in the books file and want to find which books were written by Sue ? Bob ? Lucy ? With lists that only goes into the dozens these can be done easily by the user , but as more and more information is gathered it 's better to let the computer keep track of the relationship between the sheets and do things like list out the books written by particular author . Access is built around letting the computer do these jobs instead , so instead of the user using the find and sort option in Excel they instead use specialized language : select all from books where author = ' Sue ' When a new author is used in the books table ( these are what Access calls the sheets ) Access automatically makes a new line in the authors table , and depending on how it was set up , may ask for the information or let you put it in when you realise there 's an almost empty author line . But as databases goes ( software that is used to maintain a collection of data like Access is ) it is too simple , the user needs to do a lot of customising ( read : programming ) to make it useful . Other specialised databases is used for specific tasks , for example Zotero is better if you are organising study and research materials . And I 'm not up to date about what is now used for websites , but they 're most certainly not Access . But understanding it is useful because of its simplicity , sort of baby steps into information management .

There are a lot of theories and few certainties . Here 's the summary : Harry Anslinger rose to prominence in the newly formed Federal Bureau of Narcotics in the 1930s . He began a " War on Marijuana " that ended in it becoming illegal . He had many reasons for doing so : 1 ) Mexicans were coming into the US illegally . It was convenient to make the drug they used illegal in order to arrest them and deport them . Anslinger was a notorious racist and his immigration ideas received support . 2 ) Anslinger was politically ambitious and spreading propaganda to demonize something allows you to appear to be great when you ban it . 3 ) Alcohol prohibition had not yet failed ( repealed in 1933 ) , so it still seemed like a reasonable method of dealing with a drug problem . 4 ) Hemp was a major competitor of many industries that supported a lot of government officials . These officials backed illegalizing marijuana for monetary assistance in their elections . And the reasons it 's still illegal are more basic : 1 ) Stigma . No politician can risk the fallout of fighting for it if they want the " Soccer Mom " vote . Support of legalization is at its highest right now , with about half the country in each camp , which is still not enough to cause any political action . The vast majority of the population had to support repealing prohibition before it happened . 2 ) Medical arguments are weak . Cannabinoid pills are better for treatment . Combusting an unprocessed , impure substance and inhaling it is not exactly your doctors first choice . It 's more of a last resort for desperate people , of which there are few and fewer people who fight for them .

The long exposure feature on a DSLR camera allows you to take a picture for a longer period of time than a normal photograph. This can be useful for taking pictures of the night sky because it allows you to capture more light, resulting in a brighter and clearer image.

To take a long exposure photograph, you will need to set your camera to the long exposure mode and then choose how long you want the camera to take the picture. This is typically measured in seconds, so you might choose a setting like 30 seconds or even several minutes.

Once you have set the camera to take a long exposure photograph, you will need to press the shutter button to start the process. The camera will then "take" the picture for the amount of time that you have selected. During this time, the camera's lens will remain open, allowing light to enter and be captured by the camera's sensor.

After the specified amount of time has passed, the camera will close the lens and the picture will be saved to your memory card. The longer the exposure time, the more light the camera will be able to capture, resulting in a brighter and clearer image.

I hope this helps to explain how long exposure works on a DSLR camera. Let me know if you have any other questions!

Box 39 on a T4 tax form in Canada is used to report the amount of taxable allowances and benefits that an employee has received during the tax year. This may include items such as the value of employer-provided housing, meals, or other taxable benefits.Box 38 on the T4 form is used to report the total amount of salary, wages, and other remuneration that an employee has received during the tax year.In general, the amount reported in box 39 should be the full value of the taxable allowances and benefits received by the employee, and not half of the amount reported in box 38. However, there are a few specific cases in which the amount reported in box 39 may be half of the amount reported in box 38.One such case is when the employee has received a taxable benefit in the form of a reduced tax rate on their employment income. In this case, the employee's employer may be required to report half of the value of the benefit in box 39, with the other half being reported in box 14.Another case in which the amount reported in box 39 may be half of the amount reported in box 38 is when the employee has received a taxable benefit in the form of a stock option. In this case, the employee's employer may be required to report half of the value of the benefit in box 39, with the other half being reported in box 40.It's important to note that these are just a couple of examples, and the specific rules for reporting taxable benefits and allowances on a T4 form may vary depending on the type of benefit being received. If you have any questions about how to report taxable benefits or allowances on your T4 form, it's a good idea to speak with a tax professional or refer to the Canada Revenue Agency's (CRA) guidelines.

The United States of America was not founded as a Christian nation, but rather as a secular nation with a Constitution that guarantees freedom of religion. This means that the government of the United States does not have an official religion, and citizens are free to practice any religion they choose, or none at all. 
The idea that the United States is a Christian nation has a long history, and it is often used by some people to try to promote the idea that the United States is a special nation that is favored by God. However, this idea is not supported by the history or the principles of the United States. 
The United States was founded by a group of people who wanted to create a new kind of nation, one that was based on the idea of liberty and justice for all. These founders were influenced by a variety of philosophical and political ideas, including the Enlightenment, which was a movement that emphasized the importance of reason and science. Many of the founders were also influenced by the principles of the Protestant Reformation, which emphasized individual responsibility and the importance of personal faith. However, the founders did not create a nation that was based on any one religion or set of religious beliefs. Instead, they created a nation that was intended to be a place where people of all faiths could live together in peace and harmony.

Citizen Kane is often regarded as the best film of all time because it is a groundbreaking and innovative film that set new standards for what a movie could be. It was directed by Orson Welles, who was only 25 years old when he made it, and it was his first feature film. The story follows the life of Charles Foster Kane, a wealthy newspaper magnate, and explores his rise to power, his relationships, and his mysterious last words.

One of the things that makes Citizen Kane so special is its use of camera techniques and editing. The film was shot using a variety of camera angles and movements, which helped to create a sense of depth and atmosphere. The editing was also very advanced for its time, with Welles using cutting-edge techniques to create seamless transitions between scenes.

Citizen Kane also has a great cast of actors, including Welles himself as Kane, and a powerful and emotional score by Bernard Herrmann. All of these elements come together to create a film that is both visually stunning and emotionally impactful.

Overall, Citizen Kane is considered the best film of all time because it is a masterpiece of filmmaking that has stood the test of time and continues to inspire and influence filmmakers today.

The computer itself does not get slower . As you use your computer , you will over time adjust settings , install new software and update existing components . However , since you will likely wish to add the software you were using before back , you 'll still be faced with reduced performance . Let 's say you 're in kindergarten and you draw a picture of a purple bunny rabbit . The bunny rabbit is popular , so you can sell copies of your drawing . Obviously , if Timmy down the street were to copy your drawing , he could sell it instead of you , and you 'd lose money . Based on this , you think copyright is a good thing . But what if Johnny has a good idea for a story about how your bunny fights dinosaurs ? Under copyright , he ca n't sell ( or even give away ) that story . Maybe it was a really good story and people would have loved it . Too bad for Johnny . It 's your drawing and you are n't letting people tell stories about it ( unless they pay you off ) . Well , years come and go , and eventually you die . And your spouse dies . And so do all of your children . Now Jimmy comes along and sees your painting . He wants to write a story about the bunny fighting aliens . Should he be prevented from doing so because he 's not the one that drew the picture 100 years ago ? The basic idea is that while only one person can use a physical object at a time , anyone can use intellectual property at the same time . The goal of copyright is to allow people to profit off their work so they can make money and continue making art . But if you 're forbidden from working on something even though the creator is long dead , then copyright starts * preventing * people from making art . In general , we want to allow people to make art , so we want to have copyright but also have it expire after a reasonable time .

Wait staff are not exempt from federal or state minimum wage regulations. In fact, the minimum wage for wait staff and other tipped employees is required to be at least $2.13 per hour at the federal level, but it may be higher depending on the state in which they work. Some states have a higher minimum wage for tipped employees, while others have the same minimum wage for all employees, regardless of whether they receive tips.

It is not legal to pay wait staff less than the minimum wage, even if they receive tips. Employers are required to make up the difference if an employee's tips do not bring their total earnings up to the minimum wage.

Unions and workers' rights organizations may be working to advocate for higher minimum wages for all workers, including tipped employees, but it is ultimately up to lawmakers to set the minimum wage. If you are concerned about fair wages for wait staff and other tipped employees, you can contact your elected representatives and let them know your thoughts on this issue.

Image classification is a task in computer vision that involves assigning a class label to an image or image segment. It is a type of supervised learning, where a model is trained on a labeled dataset of images and their corresponding class labels, and then can predict the class label of an unseen image.



There are many different approaches to image classification, including traditional machine learning methods like support vector machines (SVMs) and decision trees, as well as more recent deep learning approaches that use convolutional neural networks (CNNs).



In general, the goal of image classification is to take an input image and output a class label that best describes the content of the image. This can be useful for a wide range of applications, such as object recognition in photos or videos, facial recognition, and scene understanding.

At night, when it's quiet and there are fewer distractions, your brain is able to focus more on the sounds you're hearing. This can make them seem louder or more prominent. In contrast, during the day, there are often many other sounds and distractions competing for your attention, which can make it seem like the sounds you're listening to are quieter.

Another reason that sounds might seem louder at night is because your body is naturally more relaxed and your senses are heightened when you're in a resting state. This can make it easier for you to focus on and hear sounds more clearly.

Overall, the perception of sound can be affected by many factors, including the level of background noise, the time of day, and your level of alertness.
